title: Très confortable hotel dans parfaite situation centrale mais hors de la foule
positive_comment:
Superbe situation,entre l’Opera et le bâtiment de la Sécession avec un accès facile vers les transports en commun de Karlplatz(entrée via la Schillerplatz).
Chambre confortable(bain et douche)avec vue dégagée.
Petit déjeuner très bon,jeune personnel serviable.
Petit bémol sur le réassortiment du buffet,pas toujours bien coordonné
negative_comment: Peu ou pas de critiques négatives !

positive_comment:
Les chambres sont spacieuses et très calmes, même coté rue.
Le personnel est professionnel et au petits soins.
Sans être dans le centre historique l'hôtel est à proximité des lieux touristiques et des moyens de transport.
negative_comment: Dommage, le système de TV ne donne pas accès aux plateformes de streaming (Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+, etc.).

title: Excellent emplacement, excellent accueil  , équipements complets ,
positive_comment:
Buffet petit déjeuner très bien garni et approvisionne diversité des produits 
Accueil amabilité exceptionnel
negative_comment: Nettoyage de la chambre un peu tardif (vers 16h..) et pas tous les jours .. la vue sur cour donnait sur les toits ..

positive_comment: Localização excelente. O pequeno almoço é bom mas tem pouca variedade para um hotel de 5 estrelas.

title: Hotel muito bem localizado na Zona histórica de Viena e com excelente pequeno almoço.
positive_comment: Hotel com localização privilegiada, com excelentes quartos e ótimo pequeno almoço.
negative_comment: Chegamos no dia 30 de dezembro e foi lamentável verificar que não reservaram vaga para a ceia de fim de ano para os hóspedes. Só estava disponível das 19h às 20h!! No mínimo, quando da reserva do quarto deveriam dar informações das opções.

title: Voltaria a reservar a estadia neste hotel.
positive_comment: A localização era excelente. O pequeno-almoço era variado e tinha qualidade.
negative_comment: O quarto era muito pouco iluminado. Tinha que se acender os vários candeeiros em em interruptores diferentes. Devia ter mais tomadas para ligar os dispositivos móveis, em particular nas mesas de cabeceira. No quarto de banho deveria ter um chuveiro de mão. Devia ter almofadas suplementares para ajustar a altura.

title: Although the reception staff was quite rude, the rooms are good
positive_comment: Good rooms, comfortable beds and a large bathroom.
negative_comment: The staff, especially at reception, were quite rude and dismissive.

positive_comment: Excellent location, amazing roof terrace. The breakfast was exceptional

title: great location and comfortable to stay in
positive_comment: we like the location and the facilities. we enjoyed the breakfast. we meg a maintenance guy when we were lost on out first day, he was apologetic because our room is too far where it should be.
negative_comment: The lifts are too dom. we struggled to see the numbers. we needed to use our mobile’s torch to see the numbers. we had a hard time to see our room at 6th floor. our room is not in chronological order.  no rooms sign posted outside or near lifts.  and two steps stairs before our room.

title: Everything was perfect
positive_comment: Great location, very nice staff, all the facilities you need, everything was perfect

title: Solução perfeita para quem visita Viena e quer ficar bem instalado e localizado.Localização perfeita
positive_comment: Gostei de tudo no hotel menos da desorganização do restaurante ao pequeno almoço. Por duas vezes o pedido a la carte demorou mais de 20 min a vir e só depois de muita insistencia nossa. Não gostamos de alguns, apenas alguns empregados do restaurante, tentámos ir, fizemos uma reserva para jantar e pedimos uma mesa à janela, que foi confirmada sem problema. Quando fomos jantar não nos quiseram dar mesa à janela e foram grosseiros e desagradáveis  no trato e não nos deram a mesa sem qualquer justificação. Dado o tratamento recebido achamos melhor não jantar ali e fomos embora jantar a outro restaurante fora do hotel. Quando ao resto e aos empregados da receção, tudo impecável e ao nivel de um verdadeiro 5 estrelas. Foi pena os episódios do restaurante, caso contrário seria uma nota 10, sem dúvida em tudo o resto.
negative_comment: Da organização (desorganização9 do restaurante aos pequenos almoços, com enganos e demoras excessivas nos pedidos a la carte.

positive_comment: Excelente localização, vista fantástica, colaboradores simpáticos eficientes, em especial a D. Tamaris de Sousa!

title: Maravilhoso!
positive_comment:
O rooftop com Dj, o pequeno almoço divinal, o quarto com uma vista incrível. 
O serviço de quarto tinha sempre algo disponível para comer e beber.
Location was perfect, great views from bar and sauna!

title: Loved it!
positive_comment:
The rooftop bar and restaurant was stunning.
All staff were very helpful
The staff were unbelievably good. All of them. And restaurant and bar are incredible.
negative_comment: Mattresses could be better

title: A fabulous location to explore Vienna
positive_comment: We had a great stay, the staff were really helpful and friendly and the facilities were great

title: Excellent hotel and great value for money
positive_comment: Excellent location near synagogues and kosher restaurants. Beautiful room
Great location, very clean, very friendly and helpful stuff, especially Mr. Boris, he was so polite, so helpful, so friendly and kind!
negative_comment: When we arrived they hadn't prepared an extra bed for our daughter, but they were quick to fix that when we told them.

title: Great location, friendly staff and really good breakfast with extraordinary view.
positive_comment:
Great location with walking distance to Kohlmarkt. 
Friendly staff who respond promptly to any issues and provide satisfactory solutions. 
A really good breakfast on 18th floor with extraordinary views. Highly recommend book a room with breakfast.

title: Muy buena experiencia en una ciudad impactante.
positive_comment: La ubicación, las instalaciones y la amabilidad del personal.
negative_comment: Nada

positive_comment: Excelente ubicacion, habitacion muy amplia y muy comoda

title: Hotel increíble con la mejor ubicación
positive_comment:
Increíble todo. 
Muy buenas habitaciones, limpias y muy cómodas. El personal muy amable.
negative_comment: Nada

positive_comment:
La ubicación y las habitaciones muy cómodas y confortables.
L cama muy buena y las ventanas no daban ganas de salir de alli

title: Excelente estadía en Viena
positive_comment: La ubicación es genial , la decoración de la habitación y tamaño perfectos.  La cama super grande y cómoda  las toallas de diez.  Todo genial

title: Situación excepcional y comodidad
positive_comment: Sobre todo la ubicación. También la calidad en la decoración
negative_comment: Poca luz natural

positive_comment:
El personal era muy atento y agradable, nos ayudaron con absolutamente todo, incluyendo un desayuno para llevar y gestión del taxi al aeropuerto 

El desayuno era excelente, con muchísima variedad y platos calientes recién hechos.

La habitación, increíble.

Si volvemos a Viena, repetiremos seguro.
negative_comment:
Nos gustó absolutamente todo!!
Por poner algo, ojalá tuvieran Smart tv

positive_comment: Hemos pasado 6 días y el hotel es maravilloso, limpio, con todas las comodidades y la atención perfecta. Tuvimos un problema con el parking pero lo resolvieron el problema rápido y sencillo. Destacar la ubicación, puedes ir andando a la mayoría de los sitios importantes. También quiero resaltar la profesionalidad y cariño con las que nos ha atendido Cristian (camarero en el desayuno) hablaba español, cosa que se agradece y nos ha ayudado con muchisimo cariño en toda la estancia. Es un gran profesional y maravilloso persona.
negative_comment: La distancia al parking asociado al hotel

title: Buena situación y cosas que mejorar
positive_comment: Su situación pues está muy céntrico y cerca de la catedral, una buena habitación y sobre todo el personal tanto de recepción como de desayuno, destacando en recepción a Aisha que al ser de origen italiano nos entendimos muy bien con ella y en desayuno un hombre que al haber vivido 10 años en España hablaba un español perfecto y resultó muy amable con nosotros. Buen y variado desayuno
negative_comment: Estuvimos cuatro noches y una vez pasada la primera la limpieza fue muy rápida pero los dos días siguientes al llegar por la tarde al hotel no habían hecho la limpieza de la habitación algo que al reclamar en recepción se hizo de inmediato pero muy por encima sin que fuese a fondo. Las almohadas son terribles e incómodas y la verdad es que son detalles que en un hotel de esta categoría y pagando 400€ la noche no deberían de darse

positive_comment: Muy buena ubiciacion, muy buen desayuno, pieza de buena tamaño
negative_comment: La decoracion, y que el desayuno esta en otro edificio cruzando la calle, lo que no se decia claramente antes

title: I totally recommend this hotel
positive_comment: Everything was perfect. The staff was nice and helpful.
negative_comment: Maybe the room was a bit smaller than I imagined.

title: Ospitalità e cordialità
positive_comment: Hotel e camera bellissimi, uno degli hotel migliori in cui sia stata
negative_comment: Niente

title: Absolutely the best place to stay in Innere Stadt if Vienna. The location is central to all the major sites to see. Simp
positive_comment: Loved the location. Every staff member was exceptional in what they did. Service was amazing. So attentive to our needs and told us all about Vienna and sights to see. Food was magnificent in the restaurant and cafe. The bar and talents of the bar man were excellent. Reception staff were so welcoming and always happy. Best place to stay in Vienna in my opinion.
negative_comment: There was nothing to not like.

positive_comment: Location excellent. Room very nice. Walking distance to most attractions.
negative_comment: Better if can have curtain to block the view between bedroom & bathroom since I was travelling with 3 adults. For couple, it should be fine.

positive_comment: Very central to U1. Clean towels every day. Provided iron and board when asked
negative_comment: No extra pillows when asked

positive_comment:
We stayed in the Lamee building. Our suite was gorgeous- much bigger than we expected. Our beds were super comfortable, and we loved the robes that were left for us to use. 
The bathroom had dual sinks, a bath and a really great shower. We also appreciated the external blinds that can be put down to totally block the light from the large windows. 
The hotel staff we met when checking in/out at Topazz were all lovely.
negative_comment:
We thought that the €33 charge for breakfast was very high, so went to get breakfast elsewhere. 
We went for a drink on the Lamee rooftop but found service very slow. We stood for a long time before being shown to a table, and it then took around 10 or 15 minutes for us to be served. We also thought that €17 for a cocktail was pretty expensive- higher than most places in London, where we live.

title: I would recommend this hotel happily as ticked all our boxes
positive_comment: Very central location, handy for sights, restaurants and local transport. The breakfast was excellent, good quality and cooked to order. Pleasant staff and comfortable, spacious room.

title: Location is Superb.
positive_comment: The room gives a posh vibes. Location is superb. The staff upon check-in was very nice. That I can leave the luggage’s for sometime. Breakfast staff were so attentive.Thankful.
negative_comment:
Noise from neighbors doors during day time. 
Upon check-out, some unfriendly energy from the receptionist. Perhaps They’re already tired.

title: Great stay! Great location! Photogenic room!
positive_comment: Great location, very comfy! Felt like home and very clean! We loved the circle windows and the sound proofed rooms! They also provided very good coffee and a complementary wine and chocolate! The shower products were exceptional and they restocked everyday!
negative_comment: The shower mixer valve was broken and couldn’t be adjusted to the right temperature but it was sufferable. The staff was overall disengaged and  apathetic and some members of the staff were  a bit rude.. except the cleaning ladies who were very polite.

positive_comment: It was very nice. Staff was very helpful, when we had issues with lock, they fixed within minutes.

title: Great location but make sure you get the room you booked
positive_comment: Excellent location and when we eventually got into our booked room the view was fantastic. Loved the shutters on the floor to ceiling windows that offered privacy and darkness for sleeping and it had a very nice bathroom. The porter was lovely, so friendly and helpful.
negative_comment:
•When we arrived we were given the wrong room and was told they were overbooked and our room was gone and the new room was an upgrade - it was not. When I complained, in near tears as we wanted the specific room we booked and paid extra for, magically the room I booked was now available to me.
•The air conditioning pumped in cooking smells from early morning until late evening, it filled the room and made us nauseous.

positive_comment: Brilliant hotel in a perfect Central location, service was great, space was spotlessly clean. I would definitely revisit.

title: Beautiful hotel in a great location with lovely staff. Could have done with a couple of tweaks for comfortability.
positive_comment: Beautifully decorated & fantastic location! Staff really nice too. Rooftop bar in their other property across the road is stunning. The concierge booked us in there when we arrived.
negative_comment: Our room was so hot. We mentioned it to reception and they checked and said the air conditioning wouldn’t work because we had our window open… next night we made sure the window was closed properly but the air conditioning only made a noise but nothing was coming out. We could only turn the room temp down to 19 degrees. Would have also liked a streaming service on our TV.

title: Iconic hotel with amazing service and premier location
positive_comment: We loved the history and sense of tradition and the welcoming staff! Staff would go over and above to ensure that our requests or needs, were not only met but in some cases, anticipated.
negative_comment: Line of tourists at hotel cafes.

title: A very special place to stay.
positive_comment: Beautiful, luxurious property in central location.  Excellent breakfast.  Loved the blue cocktail lounge.  This was a great place to begin the evening with friends.
negative_comment: Nothing not to like.

positive_comment: Great hotel for unforgettable experience in Vienna. It was a great journey

title: Very good and attentive service staff during breakfast.
positive_comment: Very well appointed. Lovely room with a direct view of the Albertina. Very convenient distance to the main shopping strip.
negative_comment: Very poor first impression when doorman slammed our luggage against the door.

title: The attention to detail by the staff was fantastic, customer service is clearly the priority and it shows.
positive_comment: It is a jewel box of a hotel just absolutely beautiful inside. Very well located in the centre of everything. Staff rush to greet you - you are made to feel like this is your home.
negative_comment: I liked everything

title: Vienna. Full stop.
positive_comment: Nothing much to dislike. The staff were lovely and attentive. Especially the concierge and Grüne Bar staff. The anniversary gift they left for us was the icing on the cake. So lovely.
negative_comment: Not much. Wish it had been left with more of the original woodwork and patine, but I get it.

title: Would stay again
positive_comment: The breakfast selection was truly something else.  The coffee wasn't the best (taste wise).  The hotels location was great and staff friendly.
negative_comment: The room turndown service was not 5 star.

positive_comment: I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude for the wonderful experience I had at your hotel. Your location is absolutely perfect, and I was deeply touched by the attentive and caring staff. I also want to extend a special thank you to everyone who sent gifts for our anniversary. It made our stay truly unforgettable.

title: Delightful stay in a beautiful hotel in the heart of Vienna, just next to the Opera.
positive_comment: This is a beautiful hotel, in particular the larger rooms facing the Ringstrasse.  No issues with noise as the double glazing is very effective.  The gym is fairly small, but the sauna and steam room are excellent and very luxurious.  The breakfast is extensive and delicious.  Staff are super friendly and helpful.  Would highly recommend, although it isn't cheap so needs to either be a treat (or on expenses!)
negative_comment: Nothing.

title: Wonderful, romantic, happy memories too.
positive_comment: Amazing breakfast. Beautiful room. Friendly staff. Spent a little more than budget allowed on this hotel, well worth it.
negative_comment: Everything was perfect.

title: Overall a very nice stay, but had expected more.
positive_comment: Excellent location to enjoy the city centre including various concerts. The breakfast was excellent with wide choices. The collaborative atmosphere of the staff was also nice. The room was a bit old but spacious and comfortable with the necessary amenities. The concierge was also friendly and helpful
negative_comment: The reception was efficient but not top notch considering the status of the hotel. They had little information on the restaurants beyond basics for arrangements during the holiday period. Communication with the cleaning staff seemed limited.

positive_comment: Perfect breakfast, location, hotel staff, room size, comfort of the bed.

title: Lovely hotel in the city centre
positive_comment: Beautiful hotel, rooms were very comfortable. Staff extremely helpful and friendly. Great central location

title: It is an amazing Hotel with perfect breakfast and it is perfectly situated close to everything🥳
positive_comment:
It is very quiet and peaceful inside even though it was fully booked.
 The location is perfect.
negative_comment: Staff at breakfast could be a little more helpful with English guests.

title: Slightly faded traditional grand hotel
positive_comment: Location. Grand hotel style. Room was large. Welcoming reception. Good breakfast
negative_comment: Quirky HVAC and dated lighting controls. Poor room supplies. Needs updating.

title: Comfortable hotel with friendly staff in a convenient location.
positive_comment: The hotel is well-placed to reach the centre of Vienna and to visit other attractions by train. The room was well-appointed and comfortable.
negative_comment: There was no kettle in the room and only small coffee cups. It took a while for housekeeping to bring a kettle but we go there in the end. No larger cups were available in the room. The room was serviced fairly well although it was not hoovered over the 4 nights we were there.

title: Tolles Hotel, tolles Personal und hervorragende Lage!
positive_comment:
Das Hotel liegt perfekt für einen Besuch in Wien! 
Das Personal ist super freundlich und zuvorkommend! 
Die Zimmer sind sehr gemütlich, alles ist super sauber und die Betten sind gemütlich!
negative_comment: Wenn man im Lamee übernachtet, kann es abends etwas lauter werden, da die Dachterasse nicht ausschließlich Hotelgästen zur Verfügung steht und viele Menschen an die Bar möchten. Das ist aber nur ein kleiner Punkt, den ich bemängeln kann.

title: Top Location, top Servicepersonal
positive_comment: Sehr tolles Zimmer - ideal für das Fotoshooting und das Übernachten der Braut
negative_comment: Es hat uns alles gefallen

title: Tolles Hotel im Zentrum
positive_comment:
Sehr zentrale Lage im Herzen von Wien
Tolle Aussicht aus dem Zimmer
Badezimmer sehr groß
Frühstück Mega, der nette Mann mit weniger Haaren beim Frühstück einfach der netteste und lustigste Mitarbeiter
negative_comment: Nichts

title: Das Hotel hat uns unsere Wien Reise noch schöner gemacht als sie schon war!
positive_comment: Hier hat uns wirklich ALLES gefallen! Wir waren begeistert! Die Lage ist perfekt, das Hotel sieht super edel aus. Der Empfang war der herzlichste den wir je hatten, das Personal ist der Hammer! Wie zuvorkommend und freundlich dort alle sind. Und nachdem wir in unser Zimmer kamen, waren wir alle sprachlos. So sauber, so schön eingerichtet, einfach nur toll! Ich würde es jedem weiterempfehlen!
negative_comment: Es gab nichts, was dort zu bemängeln war.

title: Gerne wieder.
positive_comment: Sehr zentrale Lage, kurze Wege in die City, zur Staatsoper, zur Hofburg, dem Dom u.a. Locations. Auch die öffentlichen Verkehrsmittel waren in wenigen Gehminuten erreichbar. Das Hotel hat eine eigene Rooftopbar, bei schönem Wetter top. Sehr freundliches, aufmerksames und hilfsbereites Personal. Die Koffer können bei früher Anreise und später Abreise im Hotel sicher deponiert werden. Zu unserem Hochzeitstag wurden wir vom Hotel mit einer sehr schönen und aufwendigen Zimmer-Dekoration und einer eisgekühlten Flasche Wein überrascht.
negative_comment: Die Klimaanlage war zu warm für uns und ließ sich nicht unter 19 Grad regulieren, Nur ausschalten.

title: Großartige Lage, um Wien zu erkunden!
positive_comment: Tolle Lage direkt hinter dem Stephansdom. Coole Zimmer und schöne Rooftop-Bar!
negative_comment: Zu kleines Restaurant, kein Gym!

title: Schöne Zeit in Wien 👍
positive_comment: Unglaubliche Aussicht in der des Stephansdoms 👍 dazugehörige Rooftopbar vis-a-vis wahr sehr gut 👍
negative_comment:
Leider war der Holzfußboden sehr schmutzig im Penthouse, man konnte nicht mit Socken gehen!
Dies war der einzige negative Punkt!

title: Wunderbare Lage
positive_comment: Frühstück war köstlich. Zimmer ist aussergewöhnlich, Personell -hilfsbereit. Perfekte Lage. Die Aussicht von unserem Zimmer aus ist wunderschön. Das Badezimmer wurde renoviert und sieht super aus.
negative_comment: Alles war perfekt

positive_comment:

title: Guter Preis und tolle Lage!
positive_comment: Die Lage vom Hotel ist top! Absolut Zentrale Lage. Zudem gibt es eine tolle Rooftop Bar. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Unser Zimmer war schön groß und das Bett war bequem.
negative_comment: Unser Zimmer war schon etwas in die Jahre gekommen. Die Couch war sehr abgenutzt und hatte flecken. Die Terrasse war schon länger nicht mehr gereinigt worden, zudem waren diverse Flecken an der Wand.

title: Top Hotel für Städtetrip in Wien!
positive_comment: Sehr zentrale Lage! Zur U-Bahn Station Stephansplatz sind es nur ein paar Gehminuten. Sehr viele Restaurants und Läden in direkter Nähe. Echt top für einen Städtetrip…
Cuarto muy cómodo, tenia un gym decente, sauna húmeda y seca.
negative_comment: Solo que los black out del cuarto no bajaban, pero me dijeron que estaban en proceso de cambiarlos

title: Espectacular
positive_comment: La atencion y cordialidad del personal fue excelente pero no puedo dejar de resaltar por sobre todos al Concierge Walid, es una joya de persona, muchas gracias por la excelente atencion y cordialidad sobresaliente
negative_comment: Los huevos revueltos podrian ser mas babes

title: Caro pero recomendable. Vale lo que cuesta.
positive_comment: Excelente hotel del viejo sistema en un barrio muy cómodo para explorar Viena a pie.

title: Muy aconsejable. Para repetir.
positive_comment:
Un hotel clásico de Viena situado en el mismo centro de la Ciudad. Muy cuidado y con servicio ajuste a la categoría del hotel.  Una muy buena elección si se puede pagar la factura.
Dos restaurantes, buen desayuno , parking, etc.
negative_comment: Todo OK

positive_comment: Es un hotel precioso! Muy buena atención y todas las comodidades.
negative_comment: Nada, estuvo todo perfecto.

title: Un hotel ideal para hacer turismo en Viena.
positive_comment: Precioso edificio histórico en la zona histórica de Viena, a metros de los museos, los palacios, la Ópera y el Musikverein, y la zona de tiendas. Todo a pocos minutos.
negative_comment: En algunas cosas necesita un repaso. Pero las habitaciones son muy cómodas y silenciosas.

title: Vacaciones en Viena!
positive_comment:
El hotel es muy lindo se quedan cortas las fotografías en el página de Booking, es otro nivel.

La ubicación es perfecta cerca de todos los puntos más importantes de Viena, lo mejor a un costado de la Ópera para quienes hemos reservado alguna función durante nuestra estancia.

El desayuno del restaurante es de lo mejores que he probado en cualquier hotel de Europa, muy completo y con una amplia variedad para todos los gustos de verdad
que vale muchísimo la pena que lo incluyan en su reserva, estoy seguro que no se arrepentirán. 

Todo el personal del hotel desde la recepción, botones, camareros, servicio de limpieza todos con una excelente atención al cliente.

Definitivamente cuando regresemos a Viena volveremos a hospedarnos aquí!
negative_comment:
Ningún comentario negativo.  

La única recomendación es que el horario de room service fuera más amplio, tratamos de pedir algo de comer a las 10:30pm y nos indicaron que por la hora ya solo nos podían ofrecer bebidas.

title: Muy buena experiencia en Viena
positive_comment:
Ubicado justo en el centro. A distancia caminable de lo más importante de Viena.
El hotel tiene estilo antiguo como la ciudad pero es muy moderno igualmente.
El personal siempre fue muy amable.
Incluso fue el cumpleaños de mi hermano y le regalaron un pastel! También nos ayudaron con las reservas en restaurantes y espectáculos buenos.
negative_comment: Todo estuvo perfecto

title: Hotel clásico bien mantenido buen servicio y excelente ubicación
positive_comment: La ubicación y su toque de hotel clásico sin complejos
negative_comment: Q las habitaciones tengan pocos enchufes

title: Top
positive_comment: Ubicación , amabilidad del personal, las antigüedades
negative_comment: Nada

title: Soggiorno di coppia a Vienna
positive_comment: La posizione centralissima. La pulizia e il letto comodissimo. Anche i cuscini molto comodi. La camera spaziosa e completa.
negative_comment: Nulla da aggiungere.

title: Bello!.
positive_comment: Ottima posizione della struttura ,staff gentile e attento all’esigenza dei clienti..
negative_comment: L’ascensore dell’edificio sempre strapieno per le persone che salgono al rooftop dell’hotel,per utilizzarlo bisogna aspettare vari minuti,e’sempre strapieno ..

positive_comment: Tutto, hotel moderno, pulito, le ragazze alla reception gentilissime. Posizione super, eravamo praticamente in centro, per la prossima visita a vienna ci ritornerò sicuramente
Abbiamo apprezzato la posizione centrale dell'hotel, la camera ampia e molto bene accessoriata, la reception aperta 24h e la disponibilità del personale in ogni fase (dalla prenotazione al check out)

title: Soggiorno molto piacevole in una posizione perfetta, con qualche piccolo dettaglio migliorabile ma assolutamente consigl
positive_comment: Struttura molto bella e curata, in pieno centro quindi comodissima per visitare la città a piedi. Le foto rispecchiano perfettamente la realtà, cosa non sempre scontata. La stanza era spaziosa, accogliente e ben arredata, dotata di tutti i comfort necessari per un soggiorno piacevole. Ottima anche la pulizia e l’atmosfera generale della struttura, moderna ma allo stesso tempo elegante.
negative_comment: L’hotel è diviso in due strutture: noi alloggiavamo nella parte Lamée, dove si trova anche il rooftop. Questo comportava la condivisione dell’ascensore con i clienti della terrazza, che non era sempre immediatamente disponibile. Inoltre, all’ingresso si percepiva a tratti odore di cibo proveniente dai locali interni: per un 5 stelle forse è un aspetto migliorabile. In ogni caso, nulla che abbia rovinato il soggiorno.

title: Ci tornerei
positive_comment: Hotel ben curato in un’ Ottima la posizione, bello il bagno con vasca e doccia
negative_comment: L’illuminazione é un po’ scarsa,

title: Super!.Soggiorno fantastico!.
positive_comment: Tutto perfetto..personale gentile,posizione ottima ,bella struttura ,curata,e pulita.
Camere moderne, bagno bellissimo e posizione fantastica
negative_comment: L’unica pecca è la grandezza della stanza.

title: Ottimo albergo peccato per la gestione rumorosa dell’aria condizionata riscaldamento.
positive_comment: Hotel in ottima posizione per visitare Vienna. Un mese fa ero al Leo Grande, altro ottimo albergo della stessa proprietà e , sebbene in tono minore anche il Topazz Lamee ne rispecchia la gestione. Devo fare un appunto alla gestione dell’A/C che è rumorosa e non si riesce d esautorare con notevole fastidio di notte. Per il resto nulla da dire e per il Lamee bellissima la terrazza sia della stanza che sopra all’albergo.
negative_comment: La gestione dell’aria condizionata e riscaldamento: troppo rumorosa di notte al limite del fastidio e non esautorabile. Mancavano indicazioni scritte per la gestione delle tapparelle e dei servizi.

title: Nel cuore di Vienna
positive_comment: Posizione dell'hotel centralissima , spazi molto ampi anche del bagno.
negative_comment: Essendo in 2 edifici distinti, la hall e scomoda

positive_comment: Hervorragendes Frühstück, Personal zuvorkommendend und sehr freundlich,  sehr gute Lage
negative_comment: Nichts Erwähnenswertes.

positive_comment: Sehr schönes Hotel in zentraler Lage welches kaum Wünsche offen lässt.
negative_comment: Baustelle direkt gegenüber unseres Zimmers mit entsprechenden Baulärm ( Presslufthammer)

title: Das Hotel versprüht den Wiener Charm. Wir fühlten uns bestens aufgehoben.
positive_comment: Die Zimmer sind gross und die Betten bequem. Die Lage ist ausgezeichnet. Das Personal sehr zuvorkommend. Das Frühstück ist sehr vielseitig.
negative_comment: Die Zimmer sind schon etwas in die Jahre gekommen und könnten eine leichte Auffrischung brauchen. Die Storen waren defekt.

title: Eine gute Alternative zu den grossen Luxushotels
positive_comment: Wir kommen gerne in das Hotel, nicht zuletzt aufgrund der phantastischen Lage direkt im Zentrum. Auch ist das Frühstück mit seinen umfangreichen Wahlmöglichkeiten weit überdurchschnittlich.
negative_comment: Manchmal wünscht man sich etwas mehr persönliche Betreuung betreffend Einchecken Fragen oder ähnlicher Anliegen.Ein Hotel dieser Klasse darf hier nicht unter das gewünschte und bezahlte Niveau sinken.

title: Wir haben unser Hotel gefunden i ganz besonderen Dank an Fr Vanessa speziellen Dank an Fr. Va
positive_comment:
Die Meschlicheit, bringt dieses altehrwürdige Gebäude zum Strahlen!

Ich habe Parkinson und bin im AKH zur 
DBS Operation in ca. Einem Jahr vorgesehen. Eine starke Beeinträchtigung ist unübersehbar. Zum Frühstück kamen wir durch einen Komplett Ausfall von mir zu spät. Wir wurden hervorragend bedient und von den Herren wurde ich am Buffet gestürzt und begleitet und das unauffällig und unaufgefordert. Wir haben. Wir hatten  noch etwas am Zimmer tun fuhren mit einer  neuen Schlüssel Karte nochmal rauf wo ich in aller Ruhe mit meiner lieben Frau auf unseren Wagen warte den ein freundlicher junger Mann brachte.

Meine Damen und Herren   Respekt!
Mit freundlichen Grüßen 
Friedrich Laimighofer
negative_comment: Nichts

title: Nicht alles was Gold ist, glänzt.
positive_comment:
Sauberes Zimmer und Hotel.
Exzcellentes Frühstück, einfach genial plus Bedienung, zu empfehlen.
negative_comment:
KEIN Bügelservice für meinen Anzug.
KEINE Hausschuhe im Zimmer.
Bade- und Handtücher sind in die Jahre gekommen.
Zu kalt in der Hotelhalle. 
Die Rezeption war unterbesetzt.

title: Sicher ein Hotel wo man wieder besuchen kann.
positive_comment: Sehr gutes Frühstück. Sehr gutes Bett. Freundliches Person. Gute Lage. Das Hotel ist etwas in die Jahre gekommen.
negative_comment: Die Getränkepreise sind etwas hoch. Deswegen sucht man sich etwas anderes in der Stadt.

title: Die Atmosphäre im ganzen Hotel ist einfach wunderschön.
positive_comment: Klimaanlage funktionierte bei der Anreise nicht. Sehr netter Techniker hat das Problem umgehend behoben. Service beim Frühstück ist perfekt. Auch bei großem Andrang behält das Personal die Ruhe und verliert nie den Überblick. Das Frühstücksbuffet ist hervorragend und sieht auch bei starkem Andrang immer ordentlich aus. Wir waren schon in mehreren Hotels der gleichen Kategorie in Wien, aber hier gefällt es uns am besten.
negative_comment: Ich verstehe, dass der Föhn im Bad in die Schublade beim Waschtisch passen soll. Jedoch sollte er trotzdem seine Funktion erfüllen. Wir hatten einen eigenen Föhn dabei, und so war das nicht so schlimm für uns. Falls einmal neue Geräte erforderlich sind, sollte man sich Gedanken darüber machen.

title: Wer klassische Grand Hotels mag, kommt voll auf seine Kosten.
positive_comment: Top Lage, große Zimmer, sehr bequeme Betten, tolles Frühstück, freundliches und hilfsbereites Personal.

title: Wunderbar entspannt
positive_comment: Personal Freundlich und unprätentiös, ingesamt entspannter Luxus
negative_comment: Gefehlt hat mir das Frischluftschnappen nach der Sauna (Jammern auf sehr hohem Niveau…)

title: Séjour couple
positive_comment:
L emplacement, les services, la chambre. 
Ainsi que le petit déjeuner.

title: Hôtel extrêmement bien situé en plein centre, très pratique pour visiter  et se déplacer.
positive_comment:
Etions situés au Lamée. 
Chambre spacieuse et confortable
Le petit déjeuner, copieux, est servi  au Topazz, il n'y a que la rue à traverser.

title: Super hôtel
positive_comment:
Bien centré, lez chambres et la salle de bain sont grandes. Propre, pratique, rooftop, accueil agréable.
Voucher cocktail.
negative_comment: Étant situé au dessus du Burger, odeur d oignons frits le matin et de frites ensuite.

title: Chambre magnifique service impeccable
positive_comment: La chambre tres original l’emplacement on ne peu plus central
negative_comment: La chambre au 1 er très vétuste changement de chambre dès notre arrivée ! Demander les chambres au 8eme étage en bonne état

title: Bienveillance, gentillesse dans un cadre magnifique, dans le centre de Vienne. Nous recommandons !
positive_comment:
Le choix de cet hôtel était lié à son emplacement central, avec un accès direct au centre historique et au transport en commun pour accéder aux différents sites touristiques à l'extérieur du centre ville.
Le personnel était bienveillant et très réactif. 
La chambre, y compris la salle de bain, étaient totalement comme sur les photos. Notre espace était très propre et très agréable.
Le petit-déjeuner, chouette moment de la journée, avec aussi un très bon accueil.
Nous avons aussi profité du bar rooftop de l'hôtel, averc une décoration hivernale très cocoon.
Bref, nous nous sommes sentis très bien accueillis.  Le service et nos demandes de bons "tuyaux" étaient vraiment au top.

title: Un bel emplacement dans le centre de Vienne.
positive_comment: L’emplacement. La gentillesse du personnel. Le calme au centre de Vienne
negative_comment: La salle de petit déjeuner. Trop sombre. L’ascenseur qu’il faut attendre (quand il n’est pas en panne)

positive_comment:
L’emplacement est parfait pour découvrir cette magnifique ville.
Nous pouvions revenir nous rafraîchir ou nous changer à l’hôtel dans la journée. 
Le calme, la qualité du personnel et le super petit déjeuner et un plus.
negative_comment:
Les quelques toiles d’araignées et le non changement des draps alors que nous avons fait 5 nuits est dommage. 
Le ménage est à approfondir

positive_comment: Gentillesse du personnel,  serviable et aimable, à  l ecoute
negative_comment: Rien à dire

positive_comment: Hôtel très bien situé en plein centre ville. La chambre top avec le coin lecture à côté de la fenêtre, très plaisant. Grande salle de bains, propre. Literie très confortable bien que les coussins soient trop mous à notre goût. Relativement silencieux malgré l'emplacement central avec la rue très animée.
negative_comment: Le personnel pas toujours sympathique. La robinetterie un peu vieillotte (le robinet du lavabo m'est resté en main...)

positive_comment:
Posizione ottima in centro 
Parcheggio sotto l’hotel 
Molto pulito 
Ristorante 1870 squisito con opzioni vegetariane e personale molto attento e disponibile.
Camera molto ampia
Colazione all’altezza del hotel
negative_comment: Tutto ottimo

title: Vienna è una città molto bella da scoprire
positive_comment: Posizione in pieno centro ma fuori dal caos Struttura molto bella
negative_comment: Avrei gradito un maggiore assortimento di dolci

title: Ottimo direi!!
positive_comment:
Mi é piaciuto molto la posizione direi strategica in più l’albergo é un po’ Age ma accogliente e caldo e pulito la Spa eccezionale pulitissima aperta fino dalle 11 alle 22 anche sé piccola é tenuta benissimo
Servito del parcheggiatore Eccellente era di una gentilezza squisita in più il servizio in camera pure gentilissimi e velocissimi🥰♥️ 
Anche al bar dell’albergo sono gentilissimi !!!
negative_comment:
Della struttura ci sarebbe per esempio da sistemare qua e là delle cose dell’albergo tipo dei pezzi della cornice dell’ascensore mancavano cose minime che però fanno vedere quanto tieni al posto… 
La cosa più deludente che secondo me sarebbe tutta da rivedere é LA ZONA COLAZIONE AL MATTINO LA PERSONA CHE GESTISCE IL TUTTO  NON SI É COMPORTATO COME CAPO SALA ECCO IN PIÙ IL BANCO E LASCIAVA MOLTO A DESIDERARE TUTTO MOLTO TRASCURATO E POCA SCELTA PER ESSERE UN CINQUE STELLE !!!! L’unica pecca dell’albergo direi 
Se o so me da Migliorare

positive_comment: La posizione, la cortesia del personale, la qualità e varietà del breakfast

title: Hotel super consigliato, un vero 5 stelle. Perfetti in ogni aspetto
positive_comment: Posizione, ampiezza camera premium, bagno con bidet, colazione superlativa, velocità nel soddisfare ogni richiesta
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Bellissima vacanza ricca di storia, musica e charme
positive_comment: Tutto, colazione eccellente, staff super professionale
negative_comment: scelta dei cuscini (troppo soffici quelli in camera)

positive_comment: Hotel bellissimo in piena zona centrale, pulito, staff accogliente e preparato, camera spaziosa, letto comodissimo
Personale gentilissimo, camera spaziosa e ben arredata, ottima colazione, un bar eccezionale; in generale un'atmosfera lussuosa ma non pretenziosa

title: Meraviglioso, un sogno
positive_comment: La struttura è magnifica, le camere spaziose e ben arredate, il personale gentile.
negative_comment: La sala colazioni un po’ confusionaria e piccola

title: Over the top a Vienna
positive_comment: Hotel piu che all'altezza delle aspettative. Tutto esageratamente magnifico. Da consigliare e tornarci sicuramente... 👏

Localização, cama muito confortável, pequeno-almoço excelente. Uma palavra especial pelo funcionário do pequeno-almoço, não fiquei com o seu nome, mas realmente uma lufada de ar fresco. Um obrigado especial a ele.
negative_comment: Entendo que seria um edifício antigo que foi recuperado, então só tem um elevador. Nada de mais e que em nada afetou a nossa estadia.

title: A surpresa de Viena
positive_comment: A localização do hotel é excelente. Os funcionários são muito simpáticos e proporcionaram um ambiente fantástico em todas as interações. O rooftop do Lamée é excecional. Ótimas bebidas e atendimento muito simpático. O restaurante que faz parte do grupo, também é muito bom. Quando voltar um dia, certamente repito a experiência de ficar aqui hospedada.
negative_comment: Não tenho criticas negativas a fazer, apenas uma observação, o quarto poderia ter estores, mas os blackout funcionam bem.

title: Excelente localização para conhecer Viena
positive_comment: Quarto de tamanho generoso. Camas confortáveis. O pequeno-almoço é bom.
negative_comment: O facto de o hotel funcionar em 2 edifícios é estranho. No Topazz há quartos, a recepção e o pequeno-almoço. No edifício em frente (Lamée) há quartos e um rooftop. Por causa do rooftop a porta da rua do Lamée está aberta e é normal entrarem clientes do rooftop para o elevador que dá acesso aos quartos e que funciona sem cartão. O acesso ao corredor dos quartos só ocorre com cartão. A casa de banho é aberta.

title: Excelente estadia
positive_comment: Quarto confortável. Bom pequeno almoço. Boa localização. Funcionários super simpáticos

title: Excelente localização.
positive_comment: A excelente localização é pequeno almoço dentro do esperado. Bons quartos e limpeza.
negative_comment: O facto de no último dia não nos terem mudado as toalhas de banho e o RoofTop apesar de indicarem que ia reabrir no verão maninha-se fechado.

positive_comment: Location excellent. Room very nice. Walking distance to most attractions.
negative_comment: Better if can have curtain to block the view between bedroom & bathroom since I was travelling with 3 adults. For couple, it should be fine.

positive_comment: Very central to U1. Clean towels every day. Provided iron and board when asked
negative_comment: No extra pillows when asked

positive_comment:
We stayed in the Lamee building. Our suite was gorgeous- much bigger than we expected. Our beds were super comfortable, and we loved the robes that were left for us to use. 
The bathroom had dual sinks, a bath and a really great shower. We also appreciated the external blinds that can be put down to totally block the light from the large windows. 
The hotel staff we met when checking in/out at Topazz were all lovely.
negative_comment:
We thought that the €33 charge for breakfast was very high, so went to get breakfast elsewhere. 
We went for a drink on the Lamee rooftop but found service very slow. We stood for a long time before being shown to a table, and it then took around 10 or 15 minutes for us to be served. We also thought that €17 for a cocktail was pretty expensive- higher than most places in London, where we live.

title: I would recommend this hotel happily as ticked all our boxes
positive_comment: Very central location, handy for sights, restaurants and local transport. The breakfast was excellent, good quality and cooked to order. Pleasant staff and comfortable, spacious room.

title: Location is Superb.
positive_comment: The room gives a posh vibes. Location is superb. The staff upon check-in was very nice. That I can leave the luggage’s for sometime. Breakfast staff were so attentive.Thankful.
negative_comment:
Noise from neighbors doors during day time. 
Upon check-out, some unfriendly energy from the receptionist. Perhaps They’re already tired.

title: Fabuleux
positive_comment: L'hotel est un vrai monument chargé d'histoire. très bel emplacement les chambres sont spacieuses. tout est somptueux. Le  personnel est vraiment à votre écoute et très serviable.

title: Extrêmement satisfaisant. C'était notre deuxième séjour dans cet hôtel et il a à nouveau répondu à

Personnel très agréable, performant, sans être insistant.
Petit-déjeuner excellent, très complet.
negative_comment: Rien

negative_comment: Le spa après 20h n’était pas tenu de l’eau partout des serviettes qui trainaient et peu d’eau citronnée dans les carafes

title: Nous reviendrons
positive_comment: Le grand confort de la chambre, l’emplacement de l’hôtel
negative_comment: Rien, tout était parfait

positive_comment:
Le personnel au top

title: fabuleux et inoubliable
positive_comment:
L'hôtel est magnifique, le personnel à votre écoute, le concierge d'excellents conseils pour des visites, des sorties, des restaurants, le petit-déjeuner fabuleux, l'emplacement au centre de la vieille ville, proche de tous les points historiques, de la grande rue commerçante, des stations de métro et de taxi devant l'hôtel.
Bref, rien n'a redire.
De plus, j'ai été surclassé... cela restera un souvenir inoubliable... et si je dois revenir à Wienn, je n'irai qu'au Grand Hôtel

title: Un séjour parfait et exceptionnel dans un hôtel d une très grande qualité
positive_comment: Tout était exceptionnel. J’y ai fêté mes 50 ans , nous avons été surclassés dans une suite grandiose, cela m a fait énormément plaisir. Le personnel est très sympathique et très professionnel, a l ´écoute et aux petits soins . Nous avons mangé dans tous les restaurants de l’hôtel qui sont d’une très grande qualité surtout le 1870 , incroyable ! Et le Japonais excellent ! Le sushi bar aussi ouvert toute la journée, très bon et très pratique.. nous remercions tous le personnel et particulièrement notre femme de chambre , le serveur Dénis de la brasserie, le chef et serveur du restaurant 1870 , le cuisinier du sushi bar , le masseur Léon , les pianistes , la conciergerie et les bagagistes Dragan et Srecko , les réceptionnistes et Vanessa .. pour nous avoir fait passer un séjour merveilleux… Le petit déjeuner est extraordinaire, tout est frais et énormément de choix ! Nous avons hâte de revenir …

title: Exceptionnel
positive_comment: Proximité de l’opéra, emplacement parfait, personnel au petit soin, excellent Brunch, très bien décoré, aller au grand hôtel de Vienne vous fait rentrer dans un univers féerique!

Emplacement au top pour tout visiter à pieds ☺️
Petit déjeuner très copieux avec un personnel très professionnel
Prestige, personnel parfait. Pression sous la douche et petit déjeuner très bon et très copieux.
negative_comment: Pas écologique. Trop chauffé. Petit dentifrice, petit échantillons = pas écologique. La lumière est restée trop souvent allumée dans la chambre durant notre absence, car il n’y a pas de système de badge et les interrupteurs ne sont pas clairs.

title: Excelente localização
positive_comment: Apreciamos sobretudo a localização. Muito perto do centro. Não sendo excelente, o pequeno almoço é bom.
negative_comment: Demasiado clássico para os nossos gostos. Preço excessivo

title: Would stay again
positive_comment: The breakfast selection was truly something else.  The coffee wasn't the best (taste wise).  The hotels location was great and staff friendly.
negative_comment: The room turndown service was not 5 star.

positive_comment: I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude for the wonderful experience I had at your hotel. Your location is absolutely perfect, and I was deeply touched by the attentive and caring staff. I also want to extend a special thank you to everyone who sent gifts for our anniversary. It made our stay truly unforgettable.

title: Delightful stay in a beautiful hotel in the heart of Vienna, just next to the Opera.
positive_comment: This is a beautiful hotel, in particular the larger rooms facing the Ringstrasse.  No issues with noise as the double glazing is very effective.  The gym is fairly small, but the sauna and steam room are excellent and very luxurious.  The breakfast is extensive and delicious.  Staff are super friendly and helpful.  Would highly recommend, although it isn't cheap so needs to either be a treat (or on expenses!)
negative_comment: Nothing.

title: Wonderful, romantic, happy memories too.
positive_comment: Amazing breakfast. Beautiful room. Friendly staff. Spent a little more than budget allowed on this hotel, well worth it.
negative_comment: Everything was perfect.

title: Overall a very nice stay, but had expected more.
positive_comment: Excellent location to enjoy the city centre including various concerts. The breakfast was excellent with wide choices. The collaborative atmosphere of the staff was also nice. The room was a bit old but spacious and comfortable with the necessary amenities. The concierge was also friendly and helpful
negative_comment: The reception was efficient but not top notch considering the status of the hotel. They had little information on the restaurants beyond basics for arrangements during the holiday period. Communication with the cleaning staff seemed limited.

positive_comment: Perfect breakfast, location, hotel staff, room size, comfort of the bed.

title: Lovely hotel in the city centre
positive_comment: Beautiful hotel, rooms were very comfortable. Staff extremely helpful and friendly. Great central location

title: It is an amazing Hotel with perfect breakfast and it is perfectly situated close to everything🥳
positive_comment:

 The location is perfect.
negative_comment: Staff at breakfast could be a little more helpful with English guests.

title: Slightly faded traditional grand hotel
positive_comment: Location. Grand hotel style. Room was large. Welcoming reception. Good breakfast
negative_comment: Quirky HVAC and dated lighting controls. Poor room supplies. Needs updating.

title: Stylish hotel at approachable rates.
positive_comment: Classy hotel maintained nicely, the foyer bar is particularly stylish. Front desk & concierge staff are helpful & friendly.
negative_comment: Rooms are slightly smaller than expected, view from back facing rooms is not attractive. Location is a little far from main entertainment & shopping areas for walk.

positive_comment: Beautiful hotel,.staff were extremely helpful and friendly and the food was lovely . Rooms spotless and beds so comfy.
negative_comment:
For a big hotel, their entrance doors aren't automatic. This was surprising. 
It made it difficult to navigate in a wheelchair getting in and out.

positive_comment: Amazing location, right next to train station and close to centre. Fabulous hotel with great service.

title: Gorgeous hotel
positive_comment: Loved our stay at Wein Intercontinental.  Was within walking distance to the city centre, rooms were gorgeous, large and quiet, bed was very comfortable.  Would highly recommend.
negative_comment: Staff were lovely but had to wait for our room, which was fine as we arrived earlier than check in time and were told to sit and someone would let us know once the room was ready.  Unfortunately this did not happen as we waited for approximately 20 mins and then had to line up at reception again to enquire whether the room was ready, which it was.  This was disappointing.

positive_comment:
Breakfast reciptionest was fabolus always with smile and recat with people i would give her a raise if she was working in my company.

Also bellboy was very nice and helpfull
negative_comment: Nothing

negative_comment: Strange stuff behaviour in Caffe Vienna - I asked for a table but was offered to find a clean one by myself

positive_comment: Location is great and receptionist was very nice and gave us early check-in as we arrived in the morning.

title: Enjoyable

negative_comment: The beds’ headboards were positioned in a way that could cause injury

title: We had a fantastic 4-day break.

Hotel inside was beautiful. The decor is lovely. Very ornate. Feels like luxury. 
The staff were very helpful / friendly/
negative_comment:
Outside, it doesn't look so great. It's quite dated (remnants of Eastern European post war era)
Bedding was 'different'. Pillows were too soft and the quilt was very small.

title: Comfort, Quality and Hospitality at its best!

The breakfast was so delicious with plenty of different  food choices.
negative_comment: Not applicable

title: 5 star hotel - Wonderful stay
positive_comment: Central location, beautiful design, clean and I love the bathroom. Near shopping centre,churches  and restaurants. Staff was extremely helpful.
negative_comment: nothing

title: Fantastic
positive_comment: Location and quality of room - staff were very good as well - sister bar next door is great
negative_comment: Restaurant was a bit quite but you are surrounded by restaurants so not really and issue (Fabio’s is excellent and only 2 minute walk from hotel)

positive_comment: In every respect—transportation, breakfast, guest rooms, and service—this is a perfect hotel that exceeds the standards of a five-star establishment.
negative_comment: Nothing

title: The perfect hotel in Vienna
positive_comment: The location is perfect. The atmosphere is lovely. The staff are exceptional. We felt at home and would return any time.
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Unique and high quality personal hotel. Get ready to be surprised!
positive_comment: Luxurious and Uniquely designed hotel right in the center of Inner City. Outstanding attention to guests by smiling staff. Delicious served breakfast in wonderful centercourt. Free snacks, softdrinks and wine in lounge all day long. Really big and cool bathrooms incl Japanese toilet.
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Comfort and care in the centre of the city
positive_comment:
Great location, very nicely furnished room, friendly & helpful staff plus excellent breakfast.
Nice touch to have snacks & drinks freely available too.

title: Beautiful boutique hotel in a great location
positive_comment: Beautiful boutique hotel in a great location, with brilliant, friendly, help service - Suzanna was really helpful, and walked us to local restaurants on several occasions rather than just giving us a map
negative_comment: nothing

title: We are happy to stay in hotel which has long history background. You feel very private and secure.
positive_comment: Hotel location excellent. Also great and very convenient idea to provide lounge area in restaurant, where you can enjoy glass of wine and nice cake 😊 Free bar inside the room also good offer. In hotel you feel comfortable and relaxed due that no many people around you. It’s very peaceful and quiet.

title: Great location. Great hotel. Great people!
positive_comment: Great location. All mod cons with a nod to its past and the history of the hotel. Staff were extremely helpful and even went out of their way to acknowledge one of us whose birthday was on the first day there. Room was wonderful too.
negative_comment: The restaurant was closed during our stay for renovation but the breakfast was delicious (and the staff were always happy to recommend places to eat)

title: Highly Recommended – Central, Elegant and Comfortable
positive_comment:
We had a wonderful stay at the hotel. The location is absolutely perfect, right in the heart of the city and within walking distance to all major attractions.

We were pleasantly surprised to receive a room upgrade, which made our stay even more special. The hotel itself is very elegant and stylish, and the rooms are thoughtfully designed and extremely comfortable.

The staff were friendly and helpful throughout our stay. Cleanliness was impeccable, and everything was very well maintained.

Breakfast is à la carte and truly excellent — a great way to start the day.

Overall, we were extremely satisfied and would definitely stay here again. Highly recommended!

title: Estadía Perfecta
positive_comment: Piezas muy cómodas, muy buena cama y excelente ubicación
La ubicación, el desayuno y la atención. Buen espacio para guardar la ropa en el armario.
negative_comment: La relación calidad-precio es fantástica, pero sí que es cierto que las habitaciones, al menos el baño (la ducha), es un poco viejo y podría mejorarse. Igualmente, pasamos 5 noches y estuvimos muy a gusto.

title: Recordando la elegancia y el lujo antiguo
positive_comment: Gimnasio muy bien equipado. Lujoso hotel elegante, con mucha atención a los detalles. En recepción pudieron ponernos las 3 habitaciones en el mismo piso. Todo el personal muy amable. Los bombones en recepción fueron un bonito detalle.
negative_comment: Por poner una pega: un hotel más antiguo, de belleza clásica.

title: Excepcional

title: Monarchisch verwöhnen lassen
positive_comment: Geschmackvoll zuckersüß hochwertig ausgestattet mit einem durchdachten, zuvorkommendem Gesamtkonzept. Hier fühlte ich mich tatsächlich wie eine Königin, denn ich wurde bei Ankunft im Zimmer mit handgemachten Süßigkeiten und dem Hauswein begrüßt. Die Lage ist atemberaubende 200 vom Stephansdom und ebenso von der "Instituion" Café Korb". Phänomenal!
negative_comment: Dass das einzigartige Zeltdach überm Restaurant nicht schon geöffnet war Mitte März. Das Wetter war nämlich traumhaft!

title: Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und kommen bei Bedarf gerne wieder!!
positive_comment: Die Lage ist top! Die Freundlichkeit des Personals, ebenso! Der Frühstücks- bzw. Aufenthaltsraum wunderschön und fein dass man sich Kleinigkeiten ohne Aufpreis nehmen kann! Die Größe der Suite und der Ausblick, perfekt! So nett dass man im Zimmer mit einem persönlichem Schreiben, Macarons und einer Flasche Wein begrüßt wird!!! Die Einrichtung hat mir extrem gut gefallen, der Teppich ist farbentechnisch etwas gewöhnungsbedürftig. Die Riesenfenster wahnsinnig sauber!! Bei geschlossenen Fenstern, extrem ruhig!
negative_comment: Man könnte vor der Couch noch einen Wohnzimmertisch anbringen. Vielleicht ein paar Bügel mehr zum Aufhängen, das Licht im Bad beim Spiegel könnte heller sein (zum Schminken). Oder ein beleuchteter Schminkspiegel wäre auch toll!

title: Top Hotel, Top Personal, top Lage
positive_comment:
Du Lage ist top alles zu Fuß erreichbar. 
Zimmer absolut genial! Sauberkeit 10/10, Bad 10/10. technisch hochmodern und doch ganz im Wiener jugend Stil. Liebe zum Detail 12/10. überall nette Aufmerksamkeiten für den Gast. 
Im Restaurant stehen tagsüber Getränke, Wein und Gebäck/ Kuchen kostenfrei zur Verfügung. 
Es wird ein jeder Wunsch von den Augen abgelesen. 
Das Personal is Erstklassig und weiss wie man Gäste behandelt.
Wie kommen wieder
negative_comment: Alles hat gefallen

positive_comment: Frühstück war 10 Sterne! A-la-Card-Frühstück macht einfach vieles entspannter, es war köstlich.
negative_comment: Teppichboden in den Zimmer und teilweise nicht ganz sauber.

title: Wunderbar
positive_comment:
Unser Aufenthalt im Hotel The Leo Grand war in jeder Hinsicht außergewöhnlich. Wir haben uns vom ersten Moment an rundum wohlgefühlt. Das Interieur wurde mit außergewöhnlich viel Liebe zum Detail gestaltet – jedes Element wirkt sorgfältig ausgewählt und harmonisch aufeinander abgestimmt. Wunderbar.
Das Personal ist überaus zuvorkommend, herzlich und professionell, sodass man sich als Gast wirklich geschätzt fühlt. Besonders beeindruckt hat uns die einzigartige Lage sowie die faszinierende, traditionsreiche Geschichte des Hauses. 
Wir sind positiv überrascht und kommen sehr gerne wieder.

title: Ein wunderbares Boutique Hotel im Herzen Wiens
positive_comment:
Ein wunderbares Boutique-Hotel in bester Innenstadtlage. Viele Sehenswürdigkeiten sind bequem zu Fuß erreichbar.
Die Einrichtung ist stilvoll, gehoben und sehr geschmackvoll mit Liebe zum Detail, man fühlt sich sofort wohl.
Das Frühstück war ausgezeichnet: hochwertige Auswahl, frisch und liebevoll präsentiert.
Besonders positiv ist uns das sehr zuvorkommende und freundliche Personal aufgefallen – aufmerksam, professionell und herzlich.
Insgesamt ein rundum gelungener Aufenthalt. Wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen.
negative_comment: Nur die Raumdüfte waren für unser persönliches Empfinden teilweise etwas intensiv.

positive_comment: Perfekte Lage und ideale Grösse. Wunderbares Beispiel um typisches Wien zu erleben. Wunderschönes Zimmer geschmackvoll eingerichtet und hochwertiges Bett. Was will man mehr?
negative_comment: Wirklich nichts zu bemängeln…

positive_comment: Disponibilità, pulizia, posizione comodissimo. hanno organizzato una piccola sorpresa per il compleanno che festeggiavano, una coccola davvero gradita.

title: Tutto estremamente meraviglioso, la città è bellissima e maestosa , l’accoglienza è stata ottima

positive_comment:
Siamo stati coccolati, il check in non è il solito luogo chiassoso ma un salottino confortevole.
Siamo stati accompagnati in camera, dove ci hanno spiegato tutte le peculiarità e servizi disponibili,con un'ottima bottiglia di vino bianco come benvenuto.
La camera è meravigliosa e tutti gli accessori sono proprio da 5 stelle.

Anche la sala per la colazione sembra un giardino d'inverno , dove i caldi colori della tappezzeria ti rilassano .

Infine la sua posizione, ottima perché ci troviamo in zona centralissima e non abbiamo avuto bisogno dell'auto per spostarci.
Pulizia e attenzione di tutto il personale, la posizione é speciale
Appena siamo entrati in stanza siamo rimasti con la bocca aperta.. tutto curato nei minimi dettagli non mancava nulla , spaziosa perfetta

title: Charming Hotel nell’elegante Vienna
positive_comment: Posizione centralissima. Non credo ci sia posizione migliore. Colazione alla carta di gran livello. Camera spaziosa e con grande charme. Disponibilità e cortesia dello staff. Mini bar e spazio Lounge (con relativi servizi) completamente gratuiti

positive_comment: Posizione stupenda davanti alla fermata della metro e ideale per fare qualunque tipo di escursione. Personale super gentile e disponibile, con camere funzionali ed eleganti. Dotate di ogni confort, anche in bagno.

positive_comment:
Ho avuto il piacere di soggiornare all'InterContinental Vienna by IHG e l'esperienza è stata assolutamente straordinaria. Il personale è stato incredibilmente accogliente e disponibile. . La stanza era impeccabile: pulita, elegante e confortevole, con ogni dettaglio curato per garantire il massimo del relax.
La vista sulla città di Vienna era mozzafiato. Un soggiorno perfetto che consiglio vivamente a chiunque voglia scoprire il cuore di Vienna con il massimo del comfort e della qualità.
Hotel accogliente ed elegante a due passi dal centro di Vienna. Accoglienza impeccabile e letto comodissimo.
La posizione abbastanza centrale, la ricchezza della colazione e le stanze.
La hall dell'albergo, la colazione e la cortesia del personale.

In addition to the timing, there were also oversights and shortages of products to serve at the table. This feedback is not a criticism in itself, but a suggestion to improve a truly weak point of this wonderful hotel.

title: Ein Hotel mit Stil, Persönlichkeit und echter Gastfreundschaft – wir kommen sehr gerne wieder!
positive_comment:
Unser Aufenthalt im The Guesthouse Vienna war rundum großartig. Besonders beeindruckt haben uns die Liebe zum Detail, der individuelle Service und die echte Herzlichkeit, mit der man hier empfangen wird. Die Unterstützung bei der Organisation von Blumen sowie die lieben, persönlichen Glückwünsche haben unserem Aufenthalt eine ganz besondere Note verliehen.
Ein besonderer Dank geht an Mladen und das Team für ihre außergewöhnliche Freundlichkeit, Hilfsbereitschaft und Professionalität. Ihr Engagement macht den Unterschied und bleibt in bester Erinnerung.

title: Molto PET FRIENDLY!! Bravi
positive_comment: La struttura si trova in una posizione centrale, ma estremamente silenziosa. Noi viaggiavamo in compagnia del nostro cagnolino e sono stati veramente gentili nel far trovare al nostro arrivo cuccia,ciotola e premietti nelle nostra  bella stanza e senza nessun costo aggiuntivo (incredibile!). Davanti all’hotel c’è un parco piccolino, dove puoi far correre il tuo cane liberamente  e vi garantisco che è un lusso. Visto che nei parchi difficilmente i cani possono entrare. Anche se devo ammettere che sparse nella città ci sono varie  aree dedicate ai nostri cagnolini. Il mini bar gratuito , acqua , coca cola,  aranciata, succhi di frutta e vino sempre disponibili.  Lo staff gentile. Il ristorante sempre affollato , sia di giorno che di sera. Ovviamente abbiamo apprezzato anche noi la loro cucina..colazione super! Cena fantastica. Prenotate sempre.
negative_comment: Forse una cosa c’è . Non mi è piaciuto il comportamento di uno dei camerieri, in quanto pur avendo riservato la sera prima un determinato tavolo al  maitre di sala. Il cameriere della mattina , pur essendoci scritto RISERVATO ed apparecchiato per Due, ha detto che non poteva darci quel tavolo perché era per 5 persone . Noi senza parole. Mi ha dato molto fastidio. Peccato perché il Maitre di Sala era veramente una persona professionale. Mentre il cameriere neanche un po’. Pazienza

title: Fabulous. Nothing to complain about.
positive_comment:
Nice large room with wide windows. Quiet. Well equipped with an espresso maker and bar fridge. So many free things including daily wine and drinks. Daily check up to see if we needed anything extra. Staff were so helpful.
A great place to stay and so central. Highly recommended.

Wir haben unseren 45.ten Hochzeitstag gefeiert. Von der Ankunft bis zur wegfahrt war das Personal bis auf zwei Ausnahmen sehr nett und zuvorkommend. Sie haben alle sehr freundlich gelacht und einem jeden Wunsch erfüllt. Besonders hervorheben möchten wir Normen und Davide.  Das Essen im Steakhaus war sehr gut. Das Essen jedoch im Pastamare war aussergewöhnlich. Wir durften ein acht Gang Menü geniessen was uns vollkommen begeisterte. Der Spa Bereich inkl. Massage ist jederzeit weiter zu empfehlen. Das Hotel ist sehr zentral gelegen und das Zentrum zu Fuss erreichbar.
negative_comment: Beim Nachtessen im Steakhaus lief für uns die falsche Musik. Wien hat sehr schöne Musik und da sollte man nicht unbedingt BUM BUM Musik laufen lassen. War Störend. Als der Kellner uns beim Frühstück beraten hat, ist die zuständige Chefin vom Service gekommen und hat uns unterbrochen und den Kellner weggeschickt was eines Ritz Carlton unwürdig ist. Das Frühstück war sehr gut. Wir bevorzugen jedoch ein Büffet zum selber bedienen. Die Wartezeiten waren zeitweise sehr lang. In der Bar bediente uns eine Dame die zuvor mit jemandem Deutsch gesprochen hat und mit uns nur Italienisch und Englisch obwohl wir erklärten, dass wir nur Deutsch sprechen. Die Speisekarten sind vordem Haus und im Restaurant nicht identisch.

title: Perfekt für einen entspannten Wientrip
positive_comment:
Das außerordentlich gut geschulte und extrem aufmerksame Personal. Das war wirklich besonders!
Die absolute Nähe zu allen Sehenswürdigkeiten war außerdem sehr hilfreich. Fast alle Sehenswürdigkeiten waren zu Fuß erreichbar.
negative_comment: Nichts zu meckern.

title: Exklusives Stadhotel in perfekter Lage um die Stadt zu erkunden.

title: Toll.

title: Gut gebettet in Wien.
positive_comment: Das Hotel liegt günstig am Ring, das Centrum und viele Sehenswürdigkeiten sind fussläufig zu erreichen. Wir wurden sehr freundlich empfangen und wurden upgegradet. Das Personal war professionell, hilfsbereit und überaus entgegenkommend. Das Zimmer bot viel Platz, das Bett war bequem. Die Kapazität des  Frühstücksraum drohte in morgendlichen Spitzenzeiten nicht auszureichen. Das Frühstück ließ  kaum einen Wunsch offen. Abends in der Bar herrschte eine angenehm entspannte Atmosphäre. Die kreativen Cocktails wurden, in dem eigentlich männlich dominierten Beruf, ausschließlich von Frauen gemixt. Alles in allem war der Aufenthalt im Ritz eine schöne Erfahrung.
negative_comment: Die Restaurants, die Lounge neben der Rezeption und die Bar hätten gerne etwas längere Öffnungszeiten haben können.

title: Wiener Luxushotel, ausgerichtet auf internationale Klientel mit hohem Preisniveau

negative_comment: Ich hatte mich nach einem early check-in erkundigt (13.30 Uhr). Die Antwort des Hotels war „upon availabiliy“. Wie ich nun weiss, heisst das soviel wie: Vergiss es! Mein Zimmer konnte ich um 14.58 Uhr beziehen. Die Hotelsprache ist englisch; viele Mitarbeiter auch am Empfang sprechen kein Deutsch.

title: Super établissement
positive_comment:
Pour notre 1ere fois à Viennes,  nous avons adoré notre week-end dans cet hôtel.

La chambre était spacieuse, propre et agréable. Quelques petits détails de finition à revoir dans la salle de bain mais c'était très bien.

Le restaurant a une jolie décoration, simple et chaleureuse. Les plats sont généreux et bons.

Le personnel est très chaleureux et avenants. Ils ont été très attentionnés envers nous car ils ont remarqués que c'était l'anniversaire de mon fiancé (petite surprise avec une part de gâteau). Et une grosse surprise pour ma part car ils ont aidé mon fiancé à faire sa demande de mariage dans le restaurant. Un gros merci pour votre bienveillance 🧡

L'établissement est bien localisé soit au cœur du centre ville. Donc parfait pour accéder à tous les commerces à pied. 

Je vous recommande fortement sans hésiter 👍🏾

Je n'ai malheureusement pas eu le temps de diner à l'hôtel ou de profiter su SPA et la piscine mais je pense que cela devait être parfait, ce sera pour une autre fois ! Je conseille vivement cet hôtel 👍

title: Classy hotel.
positive_comment: Everything about the stay was excellent; from check-in to check-out. Really friendly staff at reception, the bar, the spa and the concierge(s). Special mention to the lady who is bar manager.  The huge main lobby with the bar and cafe, with high ceilings has a grand feeling.  Had the best Bloody Mary at the bar and even the proverbially challenged "hotel club sandwich" was special, with chicken that was cooked after we ordered.  The room had everything one would expect from a classy hotel. From the shower to the lighting switches, to the night light to the room temperature, to the quality of the bed and linen was top.  This is obviously a very well managed hotel and I would highly recommend it to anyone who wants a memorable stay in a town with so much to offer.

We usually stay at the Do&Co Hotel whenever we visit Vienna, and once again our experience was excellent. The staff is consistently kind, attentive, and helpful.
Niko, whom we met during our very first stay, truly stands out. He is always extremely professional, friendly, and polite, and by now he knows us well — always asking if we need anything and making us feel genuinely welcome.
During our last stay, we also met Shahim, who assisted us with our luggage. He was very kind, efficient, and helpful, and his support was greatly appreciated.
Our stay was exactly as expected — comfortable, smooth, and pleasant. The hotel’s location is excellent, and the staff’s professionalism and warmth are what make us return every time.

title: A consistently excellent stay, made special by the professionalism and warmth of the staff.
positive_comment:
We usually stay at the Do&Co Hotel whenever we visit Vienna, and once again our experience was excellent. The staff is consistently kind, attentive, and helpful.
Niko, whom we met during our very first stay, truly stands out. He is always extremely professional, friendly, and polite, and by now he knows us well — always asking if we need anything and making us feel genuinely welcome.
During our last stay, we also met Shahim, who assisted us with our luggage. He was very kind, efficient, and helpful, and his support was greatly appreciated.
Our stay was exactly as expected — comfortable, smooth, and pleasant. The hotel’s location is excellent, and the staff’s professionalism and warmth are what make us return every time.

title: Un privilegio haber estado aquí
positive_comment: Tuvimos el privilegio de alojarnos en este hotel. Vinimos a una celebración personal muy importante y disfrutamos de las instalaciones, la atención cercana y esmerada, una habitación muy cómoda y el glamour que se respira en este hotel. No sé si podremos volver, pero si pudiera me encantaría volver a alojarnos aquí. Queda en la zona que más nos interesa de la ciudad que nos resulta más atractiva.

title: Un lugar donde el lujo se siente como hogar!
positive_comment: Nuestra estancia en el Hotel Sans Souci Wien fue simplemente perfecta. Desde el primer momento, el personal nos recibió con una amabilidad que marca la diferencia. Cada detalle del hotel refleja elegancia y confort: la habitación era amplia, luminosa y decorada con un gusto exquisito. El spa y la zona wellness son un auténtico oasis para relajarse después de recorrer Viena. El desayuno, variado y delicioso, es el mejor comienzo para un día en esta ciudad maravillosa. Nos vamos con el corazón lleno y la certeza de que volveremos. ¡Gracias por hacer que nuestra experiencia fuera inolvidable!

title: Estancia breve pero memorable
positive_comment:
Me hospedé en este hotel junto a una amiga y la experiencia fue fantástica. La ubicación es inmejorable, muy céntrica y práctica para recorrer la ciudad. El staff fue hiper amable y siempre dispuesto a ayudar, lo que hizo nuestra estancia aún más agradable. El desayuno estaba buenííísimo, variado y de gran calidad. La cama, además, era comodísima.

En general, un hotel totalmente recomendable. ¡Definitivamente volvería!
negative_comment: Lo único que mejoraría es el SPA: sería perfecto si añadieran un jacuzzi, ya que completaría la experiencia de relax.

title: Ein luxuriöser Aufenthalt, der seinen Preis hat aber keine Wünsche offenlässt.
positive_comment: Unser Aufenthalt im Hotel Sans Souci Vienna war wirklich etwas Besonderes. Man merkt in jedem Detail, dass dieses Hotel höchsten Ansprüchen gerecht wird – vom stilvollen Ambiente über den exzellenten Service bis hin zum gesamten Komfort, der wirklich keine Wünsche offenlässt. Für diesen Aufenthalt mussten wir verhältnismässig sehr viel Geld in die Hand nehmen, aber rückblickend war es ein ganz besonderes Erlebnis, das sich absolut gelohnt hat.
negative_comment: Eigentlich gab es nichts zu beanstanden. Natürlich ist das Preisniveau hoch, und man muss bereit sein, für diese Qualität entsprechend zu investieren. Dafür bekommt man jedoch ein Hotelerlebnis, das in jeder Hinsicht aussergewöhnlich ist.

title: Hotel precioso en Viena
positive_comment:
El hotel es una maravilla, realmente precioso, con una estética cuidada y muy bien situado. 
Las habitaciones que reservamos (Suite Sisi e Imperial) eran enormes, con camas y almohadas cómodas y estaban contiguas, lo que nos agradó mucho para estar juntos los 4. El personal del hotel resolvió nuestras dudas y peticiones, fue muy agradable y gentil. Diariamente revisan y reponen agua y café en las habitaciones.
El desayuno nos encantó, el bar del hotel tiene los precios del alojamiento, si bien la calidad es alta.
negative_comment:
Nos gustó todo, sin embargo quizás podrían mejorar algo los baños para estar completamente a altura de la Suite, al igual que la cantidad y calidad de los amenities que proporcionan. 
La suite Imperial no tenía balcón, pensé por las fotos que si había, quizás al estar en la planta primera esta Suite en concreto no disponía de balcón, por lo demás, todo genial.

title: Volveremos!!

title: A gem.
positive_comment:
An elegant, beautiful and comfortable base for a visit to Vienna.
Without exception, every staff member was efficient, helpful, friendly: true hospitality professionals.
I liked sitting in the bar, listening to the piano, the breakfast was superb as well as dinner. And I especially loved ascending the grand staircase to access our room.
And our room was spacious and quiet: a lovely retreat after a day of sightseeing.
And so well located.
Everything was just excellent.

positive_comment: Frühstück und Lage könnten nicht besser sein. Beim Abendessen am 19. waren die Schnitzel optimal,besser als im Sacher, das Ambiente und die Hintergrundmusik eher trist.

Concierge Herr Fischer ist einfach der Beste! Vielen Dank für die Organisation der Tickets für das Ballett Giselle in der ersten Reihe sowie für die vielen wertvollen Tipps. Auch die Dame an der Rezeption war ausserordentlich freundlich und hilfsbereit (leider habe ich ihren Namen vergessen). Herzlichen Dank für den hervorragenden Service!

title: Classy hotel.
positive_comment: Everything about the stay was excellent; from check-in to check-out. Really friendly staff at reception, the bar, the spa and the concierge(s). Special mention to the lady who is bar manager.  The huge main lobby with the bar and cafe, with high ceilings has a grand feeling.  Had the best Bloody Mary at the bar and even the proverbially challenged "hotel club sandwich" was special, with chicken that was cooked after we ordered.  The room had everything one would expect from a classy hotel. From the shower to the lighting switches, to the night light to the room temperature, to the quality of the bed and linen was top.  This is obviously a very well managed hotel and I would highly recommend it to anyone who wants a memorable stay in a town with so much to offer.

title: Stunning hotel and our stay was impeccable
positive_comment: The hotel is stunning and the rooms were incredibly comfortable and the extras such as chocolate, cake and pillow spray were a lovely surprise and so well thought of. The lobby bar was amazing and buzzing on a Friday and Saturday night - so much so we decided to stay for an extra drink! The breakfast was extensive and the food was all very fresh.
negative_comment: Honestly, there is no fault. All the staff were really friendly and couldn't do more for us. They were all very friendly, smiley and happy.

title: Luxury stay with the service and facilities to match.
positive_comment: Beautiful building/decor and wonderful, very attentive staff. It was a pleasure to stay.
The hotel is exceptionally beautiful in terms of location  and amenities. The staff are friendly especially a receptionist named Ahmad, who was very kind.

I recently had the pleasure of staying at this charming hotel in Vienna, and I must say, it exceeded all my expectations. From the moment I arrived, the staff made me feel incredibly welcome and well taken care of. The rooms were spotless, beautifully decorated, and offered all the comforts one could ask for during a stay in this stunning city.

A special shoutout goes to Ahmed Magdy, whose professionalism and kindness truly stood out. Ahmed went above and beyond to ensure my stay was smooth and enjoyable.
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Tolles Hotel mit exzellentem Personal!
positive_comment: Das Hotel ist sehr hübsch, das Personal top, die Größe des Bettes ist fantastisch und das Frühstück lässt keine Wünsche offen. Sehr ruhiges Zimmer trotz Livemusik in der Lobby, toll.
negative_comment: Ich hätte es vorgezogen die Lage der Suite und das Handling des Liftes nicht selbst erkunden zu müssen. Mit 2 einzelnen Bettdecken wäre ich in dem wunderbar großen Bett glücklicher gewesen aber sonst war es ein perfekter Kurzaufenthalt.

title: Sehr positiv überracht!
positive_comment:
Das Personal möchten wir in allen Bereichen besonders positiv erwähnen. 
Da können sich in Wien fast alle Hotels am Ring eine sehr dicke Scheibe abschneiden.

Schönes Ambiente, stilvolle ausgestattet und vor allem nicht zu altmodisch.

Uns hat besonders der Lobbybereich sehr gut gefallen, da die Rezeption seitlich 
hinter Säulen und einer Wand war, hat man von den ankommenden und abreisenden
Gästen so gut wie nichts mitbekommen und so war der Lobbybereich sehr angenehm 
ruhig obwohl dort auch die Hotelbar war.
negative_comment:
Was man verbessern sollte ist, dass sich im Buffetbereich beim Frühstück ein 
Mitarbeiter befindet, der dafür sorgt, dass immer wieder aufgefüllt wird.

Der Koch beim live cooking war der einzige in diesem Bereich und er dürfte 
nicht für das auffüllen des Buffets zuständigen gewesen sein, ist aber auch 
verständlich.

Da nach mehr als 20min noch immer bestimmte Sachen (Semmel, Wurst, Lachs usw.)nicht aufgefüllt waren habe ich den Koch gefragt, ob es möglich ist das Buffet wieder aufzufüllen.

Anstandslos hat er sofort alles in die Wege geleite damit das Buffet wider aufgefüllt wird.

title: Empfehlenswertes Domizil für einen Besuch in Wien
positive_comment: Essen/Room Service exzellent zu fairen Preisen. Personal grossmehrheitlich sehr freundlich

title: Alles war einfach perfekt.
positive_comment: Wir hatten einen wunderbaren Aufenthalt in diesem Hotel! Alles war einfach perfekt. Die Mitarbeiter waren äußerst freundlich und hilfsbereit, was den Aufenthalt noch angenehmer gemacht hat. Das Hotel selbst ist erste Klasse – die Zimmer sind komfortabel und gut ausgestattet, und die gesamte Atmosphäre ist einladend. Ich kann dieses Hotel nur wärmstens empfehlen und freue mich schon auf meinen nächsten Besuch! Vielen Dank für die großartige Erfahrung!
negative_comment: Ich kann nur Positives über meinen Aufenthalt in diesem Hotel berichten. Es gibt einfach nichts zu beanstanden!
