negative_comment: Nulla da segnalare

title: Nice place in nice Town
positive_comment: Lo stile dell’hotel, molto particolare e curato. La posizione ottima nel centro della parte storica della città.

title: Top Hotel zu einem Top Preis in einer absoluten Bestlage - Empfehlung pur!
positive_comment: Top-Hotel! Immer gerne wieder. Super freundliches Personal - schneller Check-In. Wir konnten sogar 2 Stunden früher unser Zimmer beziehen. Wir hatten im 3. Stock eine 2 stöckige Suite mit Wendeltreppe, bequemem Bett, 2 Fernsehern, einem tollen neu renovierten Bad und Klimaanlage. Wirklich außergewöhnlich! Auch das Frühstück spielt alle Stückerln. Es ist für jeden was dabei, sogar Lachs und Prosecco gab es. Es war wirklich wieder mega. Wir kommen sicher wieder! DANKE
negative_comment: Es gibt hier nicht, was man zu bemängeln hätte!

title: Jederzeit gerne wieder!
positive_comment: Ausgezeichnete Lage in der Innenstadt, reichhaltiges Frühstück, geräumiges und schönes Zimmer, freundliches Personal
Sehr schöne große Zimmer. Die Einrichtung ist ein guter Mix aus Modern und alter Historie.
negative_comment: Parkplatz 500m entfernt. Spontan kein Frühstück mehr zu bekommen.

title: Perfekte zentrale Lage, freundliches Personal und günstiger Parkplatz.
positive_comment: Wir hatten einen sehr angenehmen Aufenthalt. Das Frühstück war sehr gut und bot eine große Auswahl. Die Lage des Hotels ist perfekt – sehr zentral und ideal, um alles bequem zu Fuß zu erreichen. Besonders praktisch fanden wir auch den vergünstigten Preis für das Parkhaus. Das Personal war jederzeit freundlich, hilfsbereit und aufmerksam. Wir würden das Hotel auf jeden Fall weiterempfehlen.

title: Fabuloso
positive_comment: Excelente receção. Quartos muito espaçosos, muito confortaveis, ar condicionado, cozinha totalmenre equipada. Decoração moderna e com muito bom gosto. Limpeza excecional. O pequeno almoço foi fabuloso.
negative_comment: Nada a apontar

positive_comment: Não tem receção, mas o check-in no tablet foi eficiente

title: Perfect location, outstanding costvalue ratio.
positive_comment: Perfect. This place is in the heart of the city. The staff is very kind and helpful in every issue arisen. The rooms were modern and clean, nicely designed. It definitely well above avarage considering the costvalue ratio.
negative_comment: Maybe the door of the toilet and the bathroom, if I am forced to mention one. It was privacy glass, I do not really like it, but this can be a personal thing.

title: comfort and clean room, friendly staff, good location
positive_comment: Very comfort and clean room, friendly staff, good location

title: Decent hotel with good location.
positive_comment: Nice hotel and spacious, clean rooms. Good location with short walk to center and some nice restaurants near by. Morning staff was very friendly. Breakfast was ok.
negative_comment: Bed is a bit too firm for my taste and pillows not very comfortable. Air conditioner made odd popping noises a few times overnight. Last day Sunday there was only staff until 15:00 which means leaving luggage beyond then was not possible. In my case that was ok but had I planned to stay longer this would have been an issue. Breakfast was ok but nothing spectacular.

title: Overall it was ok
positive_comment: The lady at the reception was very nice. The location suits us perfectly. We stayed there before. Although there were some construction works going on, it was quiet. But we would prefer if we would be informed about the construction works and no parking in front of the hotel prior to booking. The room itself was clean, we liked the sign on the wall. It is a nice touch. Air condition worked perfectly. Beds are comfortable, showers are very spatious. There is also a back entrance to the bulding, we used it when going out. They prepare for self check in, I would miss the interaction in person.
negative_comment: In the breakfast room the coffee maschine was broken. Ok, we understand, it happens. But the milk was served in a glass jar and it cooled down, the coffee as well. Also they do not refill food. What is served, there is, and when it is finished, they do not refill it. For example, some sort kurbiskernen spread, cheese, salami, baked bacon.

positive_comment:
Bright comfortable spacious room.
Nice area and short walk to city centre.
Staff helpful and pleasant and allowed us to store our bags on checkout. 
Graz is a great town, we hope to return. We would stay here again.
negative_comment: Liked everything

positive_comment:
Great location to explore Graz. 
Nearby parking available for 15eur if booked throught reception (otherwise 40eur per 24 hours!! )
Good breakfast.

title: Excellent value and very positive experience
positive_comment: Very well located, close to main attractions without being in the middle of the crowds. Staff was great and helpful. Looks like the rooms have been recently refurbished and everything looks fresh and pleasing. Breakfast was great. Would stay again for sure.
negative_comment: For the kind of value the hotel delivers I can't really pick anything.

positive_comment: Perfect location, great personnel, tasty breakfast. No dedicated hotel parking, but this issue was solved instantly by providing ticket to the nearest public garage.
negative_comment: Some may be surprised by the interesting interior decision (shower cabin and sink right in front of a bed) with no door between bathroom and bedroom zones. Not a problem for an individual traveller, but might be an inconvenience for some cases.

positive_comment: Posizione, ampiezza della stanza, disponibilità dello staff, pulizia
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Ottima posizione!
positive_comment: La posizione dell'hotel era perfetta, vicino alle principali attrazioni oltre che a 20min a piedi dalla stazione (12/13min con la linea 1 del tram), la camera era molto spaziosa e pulita, lo staff cordiale e disponibile (anche col check-in oltre l'orario consentito con una mail chiara e semplice di tutti i passaggi da effettuare).
negative_comment: Non è una cosa del tutto negativa ma se devo indicare qualcosa che non mi è piaciuto, è stata la colazione un po' limitata nella scelta e nei prodotti.

title: Un’ottimo boutique hotel in centro a Graz
positive_comment: Struttura piacevole, vicina al centro cittá, camere confortevoli e staff professionale, ottima colazione
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Soggiorno super confortevole
positive_comment: Camera famigliare grandissima e molto bella e ottima pulizia. Posizione top dell’hotel a due passi dal centro storico. Assolutamente consigliato.
Posizione, pulizia, disponibilità del garage a prezzo scontato
negative_comment: Nulla da segnalare

title: Soggiorno di lavoro e con possibilità di visitare il centro
positive_comment: Posizione centrale a Graz e con un comodo parcheggio abbastanza vicino alla struttura.

title: Soggiorno molto piacevole a Graz!
positive_comment: L'Hotel è situato in pieno centro, ma il silenzio per riposare la notte è assicurato dai vetri isolanti. La nostra camera era molto carina, pulita e dotata di tutti i confort. Il personale è stato molto accogliente e gentile. La città di Graz è bellissima e merita una visita. Assolutamente da consigliare.

title: Wow per stile e posizione
positive_comment:
Stanza molto grande e bellissima, molto curata nell'arredamento. È stato bello trovare spazi decisamente più ampi rispetto a quel che ci si aspetta da un hotel. Anche il bagno bello con doccia grande. 
Colazione ben fornita sia la parte dolce che salata. Ho apprezzato molto la varietà di tè in foglie, non solo le classiche bustine.
negative_comment: C'era un po' di polvere sui mobili della stanza e sui lampadari dei corridoi, ma nulla di troppo.

positive_comment: Très bon emplacement dans la vieille ville, belle chambre et petit déjeuner très bon!

title: Graz a une ambiance très festive grâce aux  jeunes et une vielle ville animée !
positive_comment: L'aspect médiéval de la vielle ville et l'emplacement idéal de l'hôtel  dans les ruelles
negative_comment: Les ruelles pourraient être plus éclairées la nuit ...l''hôtel devrait être mieux indiqué donc plus facile à trouver !

positive_comment: Accueil bien et bon buffet de petit-déjeuner. Chambre confortable

title: Romantique dans un décors de charme
positive_comment:
Chambre très grande de charme bien placée dans le quartier historique.
Petit déjeuné copieux et varié, personnel accueillant et serviable. 
Ambiance époque impériale :)
negative_comment: Rien, une très bonne surprise avec de nombreux détails

title: Parfaite et confortable adresse au coeur de la vieille ville
positive_comment: Excellente situation dans la vieille ville. Chambres très confortables dans une ancienne maison rénovée avec goût. Personnel très agréable. Très bon petit déjeuner.

title: on y retournera
positive_comment: L’emplacement super central, la chambre spacieuse le personnel très très prévenant

title: Bon séjour
positive_comment: Le personnel était très agréable très bon accueil, le petit déjeuner très bien
negative_comment: Ras

title: Très bon séjour à Graz
positive_comment:
Super emplacement à peine à 5 minutes du centre ville, personnel à l'écoute et disponible, chambre (avec kitchenette) sous les toits, en étage comme demandé, avec machine expresso (le top), super petit déjeuner.
Suite à un petit retard de chocolat chaud au petit déjeuner, notre conso du Mini bar (jus de fruit) a été offerte spontanément pour compensation, ce n'est pas comme ça dans tous les établissements.
negative_comment: Rien.

title: Hôtel superbe et emplacement optimal
positive_comment:
Formidable, rarement eu pour ce prix des prestations aussi bonnes. L’emplacement est en plein centre, mais dans une rue calme. La chambre que nous avions était vraiment très belle, très confortable avec une très belle vue. L’accueil est vraiment très efficace et agréable. L’hôtel propose un ticket à 22,50 € pour se garer dans un parking public à proximité.
Tout est pensé pour le confort et la tranquillité des clients. L’hôtel a du charme et les décorations réalisées avec goût.
negative_comment: Rien

title: 3 nuit sà Graz enjuin 2024
positive_comment:
Belle chambre, spacieuse et bien meublé, belle décoration/désign. Climatisation efficace; Bon accueil le premier soir. Personnel aimable et accueillant
Hôtel bien situé et au calme
Super petit déjeuner avec des oeufs cuits à la demande et des fruits frais
negative_comment: La porte de douche ne fermant pas très bien (salle de bains inondée...)

title: Tranquila
positive_comment: Espaço e separação da área de dormir da casa de banho - uma verdadeira suite, em quarto duplo superior.
negative_comment: Nada.

title: Quick stay in Graz
positive_comment:
It was well located. Great reception staff and was very clean. The bec and bedding was very comfy

 

Represents good value for the money .
negative_comment:
The room we had was very dark...it was a design choice and there wasn't any light to speak of.

It was difficult to regulate the temperature of the room as we were missing the remote. I'm sure the hotel would have corrected this had we pursued it.

title: We will be back :)
positive_comment: Very nice location, friendly staff and nice apartments with vintage vibe.
negative_comment: All was good

title: A high quality traditional hotel with modern amenities.
positive_comment: Comfortable room with ensuite shower facility. High levels of cleanliness. Breakfast was a good mix of fruits, cereals, cold meats, cheeses, and eggs, with good tea/coffee facilities. Location is excellent: in the heart of the old town.
negative_comment: I expected breakfast to be included, but it was not. Even though the bed was a double bed, the two single duvets were not really big enough.

title: Excellent hotel in the middle of the city
positive_comment: Excellent location. Excellent staff. Lovely hotel. Comfortable room and bed with stylish decoration
negative_comment: Everything

title: Fabulous stay
positive_comment:
Reception team very friendly . Fabulous breakfast - eggs can be order to you're liking. 
Single room small but well arranged - I would of prefered a small wardrobe than the open hanging space and very small cupboard. 
Personally in winter I would preferred not to have to go outside to go to the room ( it would be fabulous in summer to be on the indoor terrace )
negative_comment: Nothing.

title: Fantastic location tucked away in a quiet space with lots of character- highly recommend!
positive_comment: Location is amazing and staff so helpful and accommodating!
negative_comment: Rooms were a little small but honestly fine for price and location!

title: Muy bueno
positive_comment: Muy lindo hotel con una terraza con vistas increíbles!!!

title: Cozy, historical and close to the bookstore.
positive_comment: The breakfast attendant was a ray of sunshine. Getting gluten-free bread and scrambled eggs along with a smile got my day off to a fine start. Give this employee a raise.

Really helpful reception staff. 
Clean hotel. 
Decent sized room

Everything was excellent! Convenient location, clean room, quiet area, and the hotel itself was very peaceful. 
Thank you very much, we highly recommend it!

We travel extensively across European cities and usually stay in 4- and 5-star hotels. Most of the time, we receive exactly what we expect. However, every now and then, we come across a place that truly stands out—and this hotel is one of those rare exceptions.
We received far more than we expected. The breakfast was delicious, the rooms were impeccably clean, and the staff provided service of the highest standard, making our stay exceptionally comfortable.
What impressed me the most was that my bicycle was ready and waiting for me at 5:00 a.m., despite such an unusual hour. This level of attention to detail and genuine care for guests is something truly special.
I can wholeheartedly recommend this hotel. You can feel confident about your stay here—the team goes above and beyond to make every guest feel welcome and well looked after.

title: Best hotel in Graz
positive_comment:
Amazing location and setting on the slope of the Schlossberg. Staff are attentive and friendly and do their best to make your stay as comfortable as possible. 
I’ll always choose the Schlossberghotel when coming to Graz.

title: Old warm charm, exceptional service
positive_comment: Breakfast , service, housekeeping , front desk was excellent.  Lobby and rooms likely need more modernization to attract those 40 and under.
negative_comment: Nothing our stay was extraordinary

title: A lovely boutique style hotel with lovely staff
positive_comment: It was lovely. Very comfortable and full of character. A perfect place to stay in Graz
negative_comment: It could have had a fireplace in the main lounge but that’s being very very picky! I am trying to find fault when there was none.

title: Marvellous, classy with a tint of luxury
positive_comment: Unbelievably comfortable bed, big bathroom with tub, lovely service, sauna 24h, stunning terrace. Whole hotel feels like an art gallery. To sum up perfect location to spend 2-3 days sightseeing Graz.
negative_comment: Expensive parking, only a few free city parking spots. One night from 6pm until 11am in paid parking spot below shopping center next door was 20€.

title: Just marvellous!
positive_comment:
Wonderful friendly yet efficient service. 
The decor is a dream. 
Fantastic breakfast. 
Beautiful room.
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Comfortable stay

negative_comment: Only 2 bottles of water was provided throughout the stay with no refill. We bought an extra litre of water for 6.5€ which is on the pricier side.

positive_comment: Very friendly staff, great location with excellent view, breakfast was very good
Great apartment with excellent view and good quality 👌

title: A good hotel, well run by an exceptionally polite and well trained staff, a joy
positive_comment: room was terrific, large, good views over river etc, very quiet, very well serviced every day
negative_comment: hotel is getting a little bit tired but looks and works just fine,

title: Good value for money.
positive_comment: The room balcony. The staff was very accommodating and helpful.
negative_comment: The automatic lights in the bathroom would turn off while in the shower. No fridge.

title: Good solution close to the city centre
positive_comment: Good hotel and friendly staff. Cosy room, close to the city centre.
negative_comment: I didn't have breakfast as it was far too expensive. Room misses some amenities (e.g. tea pot).

positive_comment: The room was very large and clean. The breakfast was perfect cool like a Turkish breakfast,in fact more than Turkish breakfast:)The staffs were friendly and very helpfull.
negative_comment: The location was the only negative thing for that hotel in Graz. İt takes about 30 minutes on foot to the city center. We took a tram to the city center. The tram stop was only 5 minutes walk to the hotel

title: Comfortable Room and Good Breakfast
positive_comment: The room was spacious, warm, and very comfortable, with a large bathroom. The breakfast catered to all dietary preferences, offering a wide variety of tasty options.
negative_comment: Sound insulation was limited

title: More than sure I will come again to the same hotel given the opportunity !!!
positive_comment: The breakfast was good value for money regarding it's price and with plenty of options and enough time given from 7:00-10:30. The receptionists made me feel like home and made the experience unforgettable!!! The room was being cleaned daily without me having to ask for it !!! Pretty close to the city center and with enough places for you to grab something you might have needed (Supermarkets etc.)

title: It was good for a one night stay.
positive_comment: The staff was very nice, the room was big and comfortable.
negative_comment: The water pressure in the shower was not really great, also the was water is very hot or very cold, no inbetween unfortunately.

positive_comment: helpful stuff, everything clean and nice looking design
negative_comment: they don't have kettles:(

title: Ibis Styles Hotel
positive_comment:
Excellent hotel a short distance away from the tram. 
Breakfast display was just out of this world we could not praise it enough. Highly recommend.
negative_comment: No facilities to make tea or coffee in the room was disappointing.

title: Nice stay with excellent breakfast.
positive_comment: Peaceful location, excellent breakfast, kind staff.
negative_comment: We have ordered room for 5 people (two adults and three kids, youngest 6) and received two rooms with total 4 beds. Otherwise all was fine.

title: Cool hotel, well situated with wonderful facilities.
positive_comment: The room was exceptional, large wth an amazing shower and botanical products to use. The original art is a nice touch. The property is well situated and right next to the funicular that will take you up to Schlossberg fortress. I didn't get to use the pool as the weather was still mild. I'll definitely stay here again.

title: Beautiful hotel, would definitely go back
positive_comment: Beautiful hotel, loved all the art and the room was really comfortable, great shower, slept well 🙂
negative_comment: Breakfast is in the cafe (not included) but we didn't know we had to book a table, as the cafe is open to the public. There should be some seats automatically reserved for hotel guests.

title: Cosy modern, efficient and friendly hotel
positive_comment:
Very modern friendly and efficient 
Management and young staff were exceptionally efficient and friendly.
Loved the cafe, à la carte breakfast and opportunity to mix with locals.
negative_comment: Modernity, in some instances, was prioritised over practicality.”

title: Absolutely great stay!
positive_comment: We absolutely loved our stay here! We travelled with our dog and the hotel was super accomodating with everything. The room was spacious and the bed was amazing. The breakfast was an added bonus, lovely dishes and we both enjoyed it so much. The terrace on the roof was our favorite spot: with an elderflower soda we sat up here and watched the sunset. Absolutely would stay here again when we come back. Location wise it is right around the corner of the entrance to the Schlossberg, where you can take the elevator (small charge) or stairs up for lovely city views.

title: Fab location, top design and good value but above all, a great team. Thank you Kai 36!
positive_comment: Our stay in beautiful Graz was a joy and much of that was down to this beautiful and quirky boutique hotel and very buzzy cafe, which is run by a young, capable and charming crew. All is calm, nothing is too much trouble, everything is followed-up. The thought that went into the design is impressive, the art eclectic and the whole concept simply works really well. It's in a great location. Sadly our visit was too early for the pool but we did enjoy the sauna (which is actually in the next door hotel) The cafe has very good, modern breakfasts and smaller plates as well as great coffee and drinks.
negative_comment: Having to leave!

title: Would hightly recommend
positive_comment:
Stuff was great - location was great! 
Rooms felt very greatly thought out.
negative_comment: It was already getting a little warm - ac was not working

title: Excellent hotel & café tgat deserves its high rating.

Very original concept, beautiful room, very large, lots of modern art throughout the property including in the rooms.
The staff is exceptional & the location couldn’t be better.very good a la carte breakfast in its café frequented also by locals.
negative_comment: No safe or minibar in rooms, no mirror above bathroom sinks to do make up, or shaving!

title: Beautiful Hotel design and rooms, excellent location, lovely lounge cafe.
positive_comment:
Breakfast was delicious and the cafe staff were prompt and friendly.
The rooms are beautiful and cosy, the upper terraces have spectacular views over the city.
negative_comment:
One morning  we were only allowed to sit at the bar counter for breakfast which was 
a little uncomfortable but the coffee and food offerings were delicious.

title: Excellent choice

Very good
Stuff is very pleasure and good
Breakfast is fresh and nice.
negative_comment: I expected hairdrier integrated in bathrom.

negative_comment: hotel is getting a little bit tired but looks and works just fine,

title: Hotel Sacher, the difference of a family owned hôtel, real 5 stars de luxe
positive_comment: Simply perfect, I can't ask more in all my life.

title: Traditionshaus
positive_comment:
Aufmerksames Personal. 
Schönes Flair. 
Gutes Frühstück mit etwas anderer Auswahl (Avocado, Drachenfrucht usw.) 
Kleinigkeiten, die den Aufenthalt besonders machen.
Auf einen vorher angekündigten Geburtstag wurde aufmerksam Rücksicht genommen.
negative_comment:
Wenn man das Auto parken lässt, werden 60 Euro veranschlagt.
Etwas in die Jahre gekommen.

title: Ein perfektes Ausgangspunkt in die Altstadt.
positive_comment:
Das Personal ist sehr bemüht und freundlich, die Lage ist top, die Zimmer haben den K&K-Charme, das Badezimmer komplett verspiegelt und hat dadurch einen besonderen Charme, das Frühstück ist sehr gut.
Am Abend wird das Bett aufgebettet und ein Tuch vor das Bett gelegt, damit man nicht mit den bloßen Füßen auf den Teppich treten muss.
negative_comment: Ich persönlich mag keine Teppichböden in einem Hotelzimmer. Es wird am Abend jedoch ein Tuch auf jede Bettseite gelegt, damit man nicht direkt auf den Teppich treten muss.

negative_comment:
Leider keine Parkplätze am Hotel.
Man müsste im Parkhaus parken und lange dorthin laufen. Außerdem sehr teuer

positive_comment: Die Lage könnte nicht besser sein. Unser Zimmer war bequem. Wir haben in den komfortablen Betten gut geschlafen. Das Frühstück war gut und reichhaltig. Wir wurden vom Personal bestens betreut

title: Perfekte Lage , Freundliches Personal und komfortable Zimmer .Perfekt für eine Städtereise
positive_comment:
Sehr schönes Hotel mit sehr netten und aufmerksamen Personal.
Die Zimmer sind sehr komfortabel .
Die Lage ist perfekt da alle Sehenswürdigkeiten , Bars, Restaurants ,Parks usw in unmittelbaren Nähe oder in wenigen Gehminuten zu erreichen sind .

Das Zimmer war einfach ein Traum und das Bett sehr bequem! Kommen gerne wieder
negative_comment: Gar nichts! Es war alles perfekt.

positive_comment: Das Interieur ist sehr schön. Als mein Sohn gesagt hat: „Als wären wir auf der Titanic“
negative_comment: Ein Café steht die Tische vor den Fenster der Zimmer. Wenn Sie mit die öffnenden Fenster schlafen möchten, wird es für Sie zu laut. Aber wenn die Fenster geschlossen sind, gibt es keinen Lärm

positive_comment:
Das gesamte Stammpersonal, seit Jahren ein Juwel für das Bristol, und das gesamte Team tragen dazu bei, dass das Bristol solch'ein wunderschönes Hotel ist und sicherlich bleibt.

negative_comment: Das Badezimmer (Zi 482) ist schon mit knappen 4 m2 gewöhnungsdürftig, jedoch positiv kompensiert mit dem schönen hellen Zimmer und seinen 2 Fenstern.

title: Sehr zufrieden, ein tolles Hotel mit sehr guter Lage

negative_comment:
Es gab einige sehr hochnäsige Gäste die auch unfreundlich mit dem Personal umgegangen sind. Das fanden wir sehr traurig. 
Für ein 5* hotel, wäre vielleicht ein kleiner Wellnessbereich schön gewesen aber aufgrund des Gebäudes und der Geschichte auch verständlich das sowas nicht immer gegeben ist

title: Hotel magnifique !
positive_comment: Excellent hotel. Restauration haut de gamme , personnel très professionnel. Équipements parfait.  Un séjour inoubliable !

title: Un séjour d'exception !
positive_comment: Absolument tout ! L'emplacement, la vue exceptionnelle sur le vieux Salzburg, l'élégance omniprésente, le service au top et les sourires du personnel toujours très attentif, les services d'un voiturier efficace, le café Sacher, le petit déjeuner exceptionnel. De tous les nombreux établissements hôteliers que nous avons fréquenté dans le monde, le Sacher se classe parmi les trois premiers. Si l'on pouvait mettre une note supérieure à 10/10 nous le ferions !
negative_comment: Le Sacher Grill manque de personnalité, les plats servis ne sont pas toujours à la hauteur, notamment le tartare de boeuf extrêmement décevant.

title: Sehr gerne wieder

Die Lage u das Hotel an u für sich
Das gesamte Personal ist äußerst bemüht alle Wünsche zu erfüllen.

positive_comment: Es war ein sehr schöner außergewöhnlich Aufenthalt in einem sehr schönen Zimmer, wir kommen gerne jederzeit wieder! Besonders die schöne Kunst und der Terassengarten haben uns sehr gut gefallen.

Das Frühstück war uns zu teuer, in den umliegenden Cafés frühstückt man hervorragend und wesentlich günstiger.

title: Komme gerne wieder!

negative_comment: Wir hatten ein Zimmer richtung Straße, nette Aussicht auf die Mur aber in der Nacht hört man deshalb ein bißchen den Straßenlärm - nicht sehr stark, aber doch (ich bin diesbezüglich sehr sensibel).

Zimmer und Aufenthaltsräume sind geschmackvoll ausgestattet. Das Frühstück lässt keine Wünsche offen. Die Lage ist grandios, neben zum Stadtzentrum bzw. Straßenbahnhaltestelle vor dem Haus.

title: Schönes Hotel an bester Lage

Desayuno  excelente .ubicación regular.

Un hotel funcional y tranquilo. Buen desayuno. Personal amable.

title: È la seconda volta che scegliamo questo albergo, posizione ottima, parcheggio ma sopratutto una struttura curata in ogni
positive_comment: Tutto. Ci hanno fatto un upgrade e abbiamo soggiornato in un appartamento con una vista spettacolare sopra il Mur.

Staff gentile e molto attento ai bisogni degli ospiti
Ci siamo sentiti accolti come fossimo degli amici, invece che dei semplici clienti
In camera un biglietto di benvenuto e una ciotola di ceramiche, per far dissetare la nostra amica a 4 zampe, e un sacchettino di biscottini per accoglierla
Colazione con grande varietà, prodotti freschi ed eccellenti.
Camera spaziosa, silenziosa e a due passi dal centro
Particolarmente interessante l'arredamento, i quadri e le sculture che valorizzano la struttura

Struttura semplicemente al top!

We travel extensively across European cities and usually stay in 4- and 5-star hotels. Most of the time, we receive exactly what we expect. However, every now and then, we come across a place that truly stands out—and this hotel is one of those rare exceptions.
We received far more than we expected. The breakfast was delicious, the rooms were impeccably clean, and the staff provided service of the highest standard, making our stay exceptionally comfortable.
What impressed me the most was that my bicycle was ready and waiting for me at 5:00 a.m., despite such an unusual hour. This level of attention to detail and genuine care for guests is something truly special.
I can wholeheartedly recommend this hotel. You can feel confident about your stay here—the team goes above and beyond to make every guest feel welcome and well looked after.

title: Voici comment nous aimerions toujours être accueilli dans un établissement
positive_comment: Hôtel de caractère dans une vielle bâtisse du 16 eme siècle, charme, aménagements avec énormément de chaleur
negative_comment: Tout était parfait

positive_comment:
Le personnel est tres gentil et tres serviable. Toute demande realisee rapidement  avec le sourire! Le buffet du petit dejeuner est varie et les produits excellents.
Le service parking est tres bien aussi.
** la proprete de l'etablissement
negative_comment: La literie... les coussins et le matelas (trop mous)

title: Excellent séjour à Graz au Schlossberg hôtel.
positive_comment:
L’établissement est idéalement situé à quelques dizaines de mètres de la place principale. La ville de Graz est absolument magique et le style de l’hôtel totalement dans le ton. La vue de la petite piscine terrasse est superbe. 
Le personnel est absolument remarquable de professionnalisme et de gentillesse, que ce soit à la réception ou bien au petit déjeuner lequel est par ailleurs incroyablement bon, avec des produits de grande qualité ! C’est vraiment un sans faute. 
Si vous venez en voiture votre véhicule sera pris en charge et garé au parking de l’hôtel moyennant 25€/jour ce qui n’est pas cadeau mais le prix de la tranquillité !
Bref nous avons adoré notre séjour.
negative_comment: Rien. Franchement aucune remarque négative à faire.

title: Un hôtel où nous nous sentions comme à la maison. Un séjour parfait. MERCI!
positive_comment: Nous sommes revenus! Pour ça il y a une raison. L'accueil est tellement chaleureux. Quelle gentillesse. La chambre était confortable, le lit aussi. Une jolie salle de bain. Et le petit déjeuner.... Juste magnifique!  Cet hôtel est calme et très bien situé. Nous aimons également le jardin avec ses multiples terrasses. Un séjour parfait!

title: Un hôtel magnifique dans une ville magnifique
positive_comment: Nous séjournons régulièrement dans cet hôtel splendide, et très bien conçu, aux portes du centre historique de Graz, ville magnifique. Petit-déjeuner superbe dans un espace magnifique, belles chambres (nous avons été très bien servi, dans une chambre spacieuse avec une belle vue), beaux équipements, personnel aux petits soins. Je conseille vivement !
negative_comment: Je ne vois vraiment pas de reproche à faire, tout était parfait.

title: Absolument parfait! Nous reviendrons!
positive_comment: La situation, la décoration, la maison historique bien transformée et la gentillesse du personnel en plus le petit déjeuner était excellent. Une adresse parfaite!

Colazione: descriverei tutti i prodotti disponibili anche in inglese,  ma un po' cara per chi non mangia come a pranzo. 
La cosa davvero fastidiosa è l'impossibilità di spegnere la luce del bagno. Dormendo con animali ho dovuto lasciare la porta del bagno aperta ed è praticamente stata accesa la luce tutta la notte, perchè ad ogni ingresso restava accesa per più di 20 minuti, senza esagerare, e non c'era modo di spegnerla. Un asciugamano in più e delle lenzuola in più non guasterebbero, perchè se prendi il cuscino supplementare è senza biancheria, idem per il piumino. Una coperta più leggera del piumino sarebbe gradita come optional

Je lui ai demandé  gentiment de le faire faire, nous voulions dîner au restaurant , il était fermé, nous avons demandé de commander au alentour de 20h00 des snacks, il n'avait rien impossible !
Nous sommes alors aller passer une commande, extérieur à l'hôtel que nous avons reçu à 23h00, la cerise sur le gâteau, il manquait une serviette de bain, le réceptionniste nous à demander de venir nous même la chercher car il n'avait pas le temps, je suis descendu à la réception pour récupérer ma commande, il discuter avec son collègue !

title: Good value for money.
positive_comment: The room balcony. The staff was very accommodating and helpful.
negative_comment: The automatic lights in the bathroom would turn off while in the shower. No fridge.

title: Good solution close to the city centre
positive_comment: Good hotel and friendly staff. Cosy room, close to the city centre.
negative_comment: I didn't have breakfast as it was far too expensive. Room misses some amenities (e.g. tea pot).

positive_comment: The room was very large and clean. The breakfast was perfect cool like a Turkish breakfast,in fact more than Turkish breakfast:)The staffs were friendly and very helpfull.
negative_comment: The location was the only negative thing for that hotel in Graz. İt takes about 30 minutes on foot to the city center. We took a tram to the city center. The tram stop was only 5 minutes walk to the hotel

title: Comfortable Room and Good Breakfast
positive_comment: The room was spacious, warm, and very comfortable, with a large bathroom. The breakfast catered to all dietary preferences, offering a wide variety of tasty options.
negative_comment: Sound insulation was limited

title: More than sure I will come again to the same hotel given the opportunity !!!
positive_comment: The breakfast was good value for money regarding it's price and with plenty of options and enough time given from 7:00-10:30. The receptionists made me feel like home and made the experience unforgettable!!! The room was being cleaned daily without me having to ask for it !!! Pretty close to the city center and with enough places for you to grab something you might have needed (Supermarkets etc.)

title: It was good for a one night stay.
positive_comment: The staff was very nice, the room was big and comfortable.
negative_comment: The water pressure in the shower was not really great, also the was water is very hot or very cold, no inbetween unfortunately.

positive_comment: helpful stuff, everything clean and nice looking design
negative_comment: they don't have kettles:(

title: Ibis Styles Hotel
positive_comment:
Excellent hotel a short distance away from the tram. 
Breakfast display was just out of this world we could not praise it enough. Highly recommend.
negative_comment: No facilities to make tea or coffee in the room was disappointing.

title: Fantástica!
positive_comment: Todo , ls instalaciones perfectas y un personal súper profesional, pero al mismo tiempo súper atentos y cariñosos

title: Salzburgo perfecto en el Hotel Bristol
positive_comment: Ubicación perfecta para llegar a todos los lugares de interes a pie, personal de atención muy amable especialmente de Rosy en el turno de la noche, la habitación excelente!

title: Beautiful hotel in an amazing city
positive_comment: Gorgeous traditional hotel, immaculately clean and great location for city. Reception and breakfast staff were amazing particularly Monika, Christine , Lucy and Floiau.
negative_comment: Bar staff were unfriendly and curt. €37 for 2 gin and tonics a little pricey we thought.

title: Would recommend to anyone.
positive_comment:
The staff went above and beyond. Every member of staff were so knowledgeable helpful and courteous. The breakfast staff remembered everything from our previous day’s orders. 
The rooms were spacious and very clean with a comfy bed. 
The location was perfect. 
The breakfast was exceptional.

title: Incredible hotel in the heart of Salzburg
positive_comment: Historical building right across from where Mozart lived. In walking distance from everything. The staff is so friendly and accommodating. The room was spotless and comfortable. We got a welcome drink from the bar, and you can pretty much choose any drink. Breakfast buffet is rich, fresh and tasty.
negative_comment: Nothing

positive_comment: Struttura dal grande fascino, elegante, molto curata e in posizione centrale. La camera molto confortevole, ampia, con letto comodissimo e condizionatore silenzioso. Ricca e varia colazione a buffet.

title: Soggiornare nell'elegante Salisburgo
positive_comment: Staff cortese e professionale. Ottima colazione, Posizione a pochi passi dal centro. In generale una struttura storica consigliata per chi vuole fare un salto nell'epoca imperiale austriaca.
negative_comment: Nulla.

positive_comment:
L’albergo è ospitato in un edificio storico in una piazza centrale della città, alle spalle dei giardini Mirabell.
Camera con vista sul castello.
Posizione centrale.
Ottima colazione.
negative_comment:
Manca macchina per caffè con capsule (solo bollitore)
Purtroppo mancano piscina e palestra, ma questo dipende dalle caratteristiche del fabbricato, che non ne consentono la realizzazione

positive_comment: l'accoglienza è stata eccezionale la direttrice (credo sia la sg.ra Mayer ) è stata gentilissima a molto disponibile
negative_comment: la colazione era buona ma migliorabile, mancava ad esempio una spremuta fresca d'arancia

positive_comment: Colazione squisita. Purtroppo non era aperta il ristorante per la cena essendo lunedì.
Ottima colazione peccato senza torte (l'unica presente era terribile)

title: ELEGANZA DEL PASSATO
positive_comment:
Hotel vintage, sembra di fare un passo indietro nella storia dello scorso secolo. Arredi eleganti e signorili.
Posizione strategica, appena fuori dell’Altstadt, molto comoda per i mezzi pubblici, difronte alla casa di Mozart. Personale gentilissimo (in particolare la si.ra Cristina, che parla benissimo l’Italiano, camere pulite, colazione eccellente
negative_comment: Difficoltà a regolare la temperatura in camera (un po troppo calda all’arrivo)

positive_comment: The breakfast and dinner is perfect and the infinity pool is amazing with a mountains view🏔️

title: Wonderful boutique hotel/modern art gallery in the heart of Graz
positive_comment: We had an absolutely wonderful stay at Kai 36. The hotel is beautiful, feels like a boutique art gallery, the modern art in amazing contrast to the historical feel of the building and the area. The location is ideal. Our room was spacious, well designed, and comfortable. The complimentary cosmetics and teas feel luxurious. It is also nice to have a good cafe/bistro in the house. But best of all was the staff - everyone was very professional, nice and helpful. We really felt welcome and taken care of.
negative_comment: The parking fee (26 euros per night) feels a bit too high. But the hotel let us park the car in the garage as long as we wished on the day of departure, which was very generous.

title: Great hotel , perfect location
positive_comment: One of the best and cosiest hotels I ever stayed at
negative_comment: Only negative point : there was no table available for breakfast before 11.. house guests should always have the option to have breakfast when the want.

positive_comment: Totaly worth the money.. its really calm and chill place..ill be back when visiting Graz

title: A perfect choice for a one-night stopover during a journey.
positive_comment: The check-in was easy and quick. The room was modern, fairly large and clean. The breakfast was plentiful, buffet-style. There was a free parking space for the car in the yard.  The Wi-Fi was stable, fast, and easy to use.
negative_comment: There was no air conditioning in the room, but there was a fan instead. The window did not open directly onto the main road, but the noise could still be heard through the window that was kept open because of the heat.

title: Ideal for a basic nights rest after long drive.
positive_comment: It is the second time that we've chosen a hotel that is annex to an asian restaurant to our full satisfaction. We experienced basic lodgings but exactly what we need for a nights rest after driving for about 1000km including a basic but full breakfast.

title: Over average
positive_comment:
Very close to autoway so it was very good for us to give a break. 

Personnel are very helpful and cozy 

Room is very clean
negative_comment: There is not a refrigator and air condition in the room

positive_comment: Clean,  all  bathroom facilities , tasty dinner and good breakfast
negative_comment: On booking we saw that all taxes are including in price for night, also breakfast for free, but on registration desc we should pay City taxes 5 eur for 2 persons for 1 night, it's not a problem,but information on booking is wrong, that's why we are angry. Parking free it's also good

title: Overall it was good.
positive_comment: All was fine, meets the expectation for the price and the amount I've paid. Of course it is not a Hilton, but the price also reflects it. Good value for your money.
negative_comment: The breakfast could be a bit better, there are not much to choose from, but still fine.

title: Perfect for a cheap hotel with breakfast! Would totally recommend!
positive_comment: Nice bright room, comfy bed, nice shower and good Chinese buffet restaurant downstairs
negative_comment: The room was a bit hot

title: Excellent choice
positive_comment:
Very good
Stuff is very pleasure and good
Breakfast is fresh and nice.
negative_comment: I expected hairdrier integrated in bathrom.

positive_comment: What I would really place as an advantage at first is that there is possibility for late check-in if you let the office know soon enough and second the location of the place is on the crossing of the two main highways, so you don't have to drive any far from the Exit in order to get quickly on the road the next day. Well recommend for short stay.

title: The hotel corresponded to the description on the website, it delivered what we expected.
positive_comment: The room was spacious and clean. The bed was used a little more so it was wobbly.
negative_comment: When we paid for the room online, we also paid a tax per person for 2.5 EUR per person. We were also asked to pay the same fee again at the hotel.

positive_comment:
Tutto 
Staff gentilissimi soprattutto il portiere 
Colazione top top top
negative_comment: Nulla

positive_comment:
Bellissimo hotel in cui si respira un’aria d’altri tempi, le camere sono ben arredate e confortevoli con una bellissima e impareggiabile vista sul fiume e sulla città.
Attenzione e cura verso il cliente sin dall’arrivo in struttura.
negative_comment:
La colazione, non avendo prenotato e non avendola inclusa abbiamo optato comunque per farla recandoci nella apposita sala, ma purtroppo una volta arrivati ci è stato detto che non avevano tavoli.
La domanda sorge spontanea, se tutto l’hotel prenota la colazione, automaticamente qualcuno rimane escluso per mancanza dei tavoli? 
In un cinque stelle questo è assolutamente intollerabile.

positive_comment:
La gentilezza, la disponibilità e soprattutto la grande professionalità 
Posizione straordinaria per scoprire Salzburg
Cena della vigilia di Natale a dir poco magnifica
Consiglio vivamente questo albergo

title: Un albergo fantastico in un contesto fiabesco.
positive_comment: L'albergo è decisamente fantastico. La posizione è a dir poco mozzafiato. Abbiamo avuto due camere vista fiume e l'atmosfera era fiabesca. La colazione ricca di scelta e molto soddisfaciente.
negative_comment: Niente!

title: I highly recommend this hotel it’s amazing
positive_comment: The location is amazing and the staff were so friendly and helpful
negative_comment: Nothing everything were perfect.

title: Beautiful hotel in a beautiful city in a great location
positive_comment: Loved this hotel , location was great , it was traditional yet  up to date quality fittings , exceptional bathroom and decorations . Staff were great .
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Fab-u-lus
positive_comment: Superb in everyday you will not find better. Excellent location, professional staff and superior service with charm and elegance .
negative_comment: Nothing

title: A phenomenal hotel in the heart of Salzburg
positive_comment: Obviously it was exceptional. The staff are particularly excellent.
negative_comment: Nothing.

title: Sehr entspannte, angenehme Wohlfühltage!
positive_comment: Sehr gutes Frühstück. Es gab alles was das Herz begehrt, vor allem sehr gute Mehlspeisen.

title: Cool hotel, well situated with wonderful facilities.
positive_comment: The room was exceptional, large wth an amazing shower and botanical products to use. The original art is a nice touch. The property is well situated and right next to the funicular that will take you up to Schlossberg fortress. I didn't get to use the pool as the weather was still mild. I'll definitely stay here again.

title: Beautiful hotel, would definitely go back
positive_comment: Beautiful hotel, loved all the art and the room was really comfortable, great shower, slept well 🙂
negative_comment: Breakfast is in the cafe (not included) but we didn't know we had to book a table, as the cafe is open to the public. There should be some seats automatically reserved for hotel guests.

title: Cosy modern, efficient and friendly hotel
positive_comment:
Very modern friendly and efficient 
Management and young staff were exceptionally efficient and friendly.
Loved the cafe, à la carte breakfast and opportunity to mix with locals.
negative_comment: Modernity, in some instances, was prioritised over practicality.”

title: Absolutely great stay!
positive_comment: We absolutely loved our stay here! We travelled with our dog and the hotel was super accomodating with everything. The room was spacious and the bed was amazing. The breakfast was an added bonus, lovely dishes and we both enjoyed it so much. The terrace on the roof was our favorite spot: with an elderflower soda we sat up here and watched the sunset. Absolutely would stay here again when we come back. Location wise it is right around the corner of the entrance to the Schlossberg, where you can take the elevator (small charge) or stairs up for lovely city views.

title: Fab location, top design and good value but above all, a great team. Thank you Kai 36!
positive_comment: Our stay in beautiful Graz was a joy and much of that was down to this beautiful and quirky boutique hotel and very buzzy cafe, which is run by a young, capable and charming crew. All is calm, nothing is too much trouble, everything is followed-up. The thought that went into the design is impressive, the art eclectic and the whole concept simply works really well. It's in a great location. Sadly our visit was too early for the pool but we did enjoy the sauna (which is actually in the next door hotel) The cafe has very good, modern breakfasts and smaller plates as well as great coffee and drinks.
negative_comment: Having to leave!

title: Would hightly recommend
positive_comment:
Stuff was great - location was great! 
Rooms felt very greatly thought out.
negative_comment: It was already getting a little warm - ac was not working

title: Excellent hotel & café tgat deserves its high rating.
positive_comment:
Very original concept, beautiful room, very large, lots of modern art throughout the property including in the rooms.
The staff is exceptional & the location couldn’t be better.very good a la carte breakfast in its café frequented also by locals.
negative_comment: No safe or minibar in rooms, no mirror above bathroom sinks to do make up, or shaving!

title: Beautiful Hotel design and rooms, excellent location, lovely lounge cafe.
positive_comment:
Breakfast was delicious and the cafe staff were prompt and friendly.
The rooms are beautiful and cosy, the upper terraces have spectacular views over the city.
negative_comment:
One morning  we were only allowed to sit at the bar counter for breakfast which was 
a little uncomfortable but the coffee and food offerings were delicious.

positive_comment: Ein besonderer Kleinod im Herzen von Graz.Die Mitarbeiter sind super  freundlich , sehr zuvorkommend ein wirklich hervorragender Service .

title: Eine tolle Unterkunft, in der kein Wunsch offen bleibt.
positive_comment: Schönes Zimmer, am Pool sehenswerter Ausblick, Sauna im Nachbarhotel sehr gut.
negative_comment: Richtig satt wird man beim Frühstück nicht.

title: Erholsamer Aufenthalt mitten in Graz!
positive_comment:
A la carte Frühstück im Innenhof hervorragend, Bedienung sehr freundlich, entspannte Atmosphäre!
Zimmer Richtung Innenhof sehr ruhig, Betten unglaublich bequem und hochwertig sowie die gesamte Austattung!
Traumhafte Aussicht von den Terrassen! Valet Parkservice hat perfekt geklappt!
negative_comment: Nichts

positive_comment: Sehr gemütliches Hotel mit hoher Qualität in bester Lage. Und das für einen fairen Preis

title: Außergewöhnlich
positive_comment: Tolle Lage, super Ausstattung, hervorragendes überaus freundliches Personal
negative_comment: Es gab nichts

positive_comment:
Frühstück a la carte prima
Wunderbarer Café
Freisitzterrasse
Viel Ansprechende und moderne Kunst

title: Jederzeit gerne wieder !!!!
positive_comment: Wunderbar ausgestattetes Hotel am Rand der Altstadt. Mit viel Liebe zum Detail saniert und gutem Geschmack eingerichtet.
Stilvoll, modern eingerichtet, gemütliche Atmosphäre, zuvorkommendes Personal, schöner Pool - super Sitzmöglichkeiten, Frühstück und Service sehr toll. Lage sehr zentral. Zum Wohlfühlen!

title: Top Lage, top Service, außergewöhnliches Ambiente!
positive_comment:
Die Lage des Hotels ist top-direkt in der Innenstadt/Altstadt; alles gut zu Fuß erreichbar!

Das Frühstück a la carte war sehr gut, sehr liebevoll zubereitet und das Service ist außergewöhnlich!
Wir wollten eine Kaffeemaschine aufs Zimmer-alles kein Problem!

Das Hotel ist sehr schön und sauber, auch das Zimmer hat uns überrascht!

title: Sehr empfehlenswert!
positive_comment: Es war alles perfekt. Das Personal sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend. Das Hotel sowie das Zimmer sehr sauber und sehr gut ausgestattet. Besonders gut hat uns der Pool und der schöne Ausblick gefallen. Das Frühstück war sehr gut und eine große Auswahl an verschiedenen Köstlichkeiten, besonders hervor zuheben das selbst gebackene Brot. Werden auf jeden Fall wieder in diesem Hotel übernachten. Sehr empfehlenswert.

title: Unschlagbarer Preis mit hervorragenden Frühstück
positive_comment: Sehr rasche check-in saubere Zimmer gute lerndämmung der Zimmer Parkplatz vor der Türe gute Handtücher heiße Dusche... Höhepunkt war das Frühstück mit allem drum und dran Kuchen Obst Müsli Säfte verschiedene Brotsorten für diesen Preis einfach genial. Hotel wird von dem Betreibern eines im Erdgeschoss ansässigen chinalokals mitbetrieben deswegen beim Frühstück sehr viel Auswahl.
negative_comment: Wie schon öfters beschrieben leider billige Matratzen

positive_comment: Die Zimmer sind renoviert . Das Bad ist neu und ansprechend. Am Frühstücksbufett gibt es sogar gekochte Eier. Obwohl das Frühstück frei war, war alles vorhanden. Man kann wirklich nicht jammern.
negative_comment: Für mich gibt es nichts zu meckern.

title: Ideal für 1 bis 2 Übernachtungen
positive_comment: Alles wie beschrieben. Freundliches Personal. Nette Frühstücksdame.
negative_comment: In der Früh leider kein warmes Wasser.

title: Gerne wieder
positive_comment: Das Personal ist sehr freundlich. Alles ist sehr sauber. Die schnelle bzw. kurze Anbindung zur Autobahn und die kostenlose Parkplaetze machen das Hotel sehr attraktiv.
negative_comment: Beim Fruehstueck ist etwas mehr Auswahl (wer keine Brot und Broetchen mag bzw. nicht essen darf) empfehlenswert.

positive_comment: Ein komfortables Zimmer mit guten Frühstück und bei Bedarf auch ein chinesisches Restaurant dabei.

title: Alles ok.
positive_comment: Alles sehr zufriedenstellend, freundliche Gastgeber.
Sehr sauber und ein gutes Preis/Leistungsverhältnis.
negative_comment: Kein Aufzug vorhanden, deshalb musste das Gepäck mühselig nach Oben getragen werden.

title: Guter Stopover für hungrige Radlfahrer
positive_comment: Freundlicher Empfang, großzügiges Zimmer, gute Matratzen, gute Auswahl zum Frühstück. Unglaubliches Buffet zum Mittag- und Abendessen, auch ohne Übernachtung sehr zu empfehlen!
negative_comment: Das Hotel liegt eher am Nordrand Flughafen Graz. Der Bus braucht bis Zentrum 1/2h. Das Nachfüllen am Frühstücksbuffet klappt auf freundliche Nachfrage.

positive_comment: Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt das Personal sehr freundlich und das Essen war sehr gut 👍 👌 👍
negative_comment: Gab keine Beanstandung

positive_comment: Lage ist sehr schön und ruhig .für kurze unterwegs ist oke.

title: Hotel in posizione centrale staff cordiale e professionale pulizia ottima
positive_comment: Colazione eccellente cibo di qualità, forse per i clienti dell hotel logicamente con variazione del prezzo ma farei opzione di breakfast included

title: Esperienza consigliatissima
positive_comment: Hotel curatissimo (sembra una galleria d'arte). Belli gli spazi comuni. Belle le stanze. Ottima la colazione. Personale gentilissimo.
negative_comment: Avrei preferito essere un po' più vicini al centro storico.

title: Stupendo!
positive_comment: Hotel di qualità in posizione strategica a pochi passi dal centro, con servizio garage. Caffè interno ottimo!

title: Graz a portata di camera
positive_comment: camera spaziosa, comoda e pulita in posizione ottimale per la visita della città. Servizio garage comodissimo. Piscina, vista, quadri esposti ai piani e in camera eccezionali.
negative_comment: in camera mancano piani di appoggio

title: Ottimo!
positive_comment:
Camera spaziosa dall'ottimo stile.
Personale molto gentile e accogliente.
Ottima colazione.
negative_comment:
Per il Check-in fuori orario occorre rivolgersi all'Hotel di fianco.
Non molto comodo anche se siamo stati preavvisati telefonicamente quindi nulla di grave.

title: Graz nuova scoperta
positive_comment: La pulizia la posizione la gentilezza del personale.
Lo staff è stato molto gentile. L'albergo è ben arredato con opere d'arte a ogni piano. La posizione è ai margini del centro storico, in una zona tranquilla.
negative_comment: I maledetti cuscini bassi. Ma d'altra parte è in Austria, sono senza speranze.

title: Ottima posizione per visita di Graz
positive_comment: L’originalità degli interni, degli arredi e degli accessori
negative_comment: La colazione

title: Really nice location

negative_comment: Polvere sui lampadari, niente servizio in camera. SPA disponibile solo nell´edificio di fianco (come potrebbe essere reso piu´ accessibile??)

title: Albergo molto confortevole, ottima posizione, personale davvero eccelente
positive_comment: Posizione ottima, colazione a pagamento molto normale
negative_comment: La colazione

title: Merveilleux hôtel
positive_comment:
Tout! L hotel est tres bien situé et permet facilement d explorer graz. Mais surtout c est un établissement remarquable qui propose 
piscine et terrasses avec une vue superbe sur la ville. Notre chambre disposait même d un petit jardin. Le personnel était d une rare gentillesse. Bref cet hotel est une perle.

title: Excellent

Très bel hôtel - Atypique- Personnel accueillant - Proche du centre ville
Très grande et belle chambre - Très propre 
Petit déjeuner à la carte 
Service voiturier pour le parking (25€/j)
negative_comment: RAS

title: Nous souhaitons y revenir et passer plusieurs jours.

Propreté de la chambré irréprochable et tout est neuf.
negative_comment: Rien

title: Idéal pour visiter la ville.
positive_comment:
Situé à deux pas du centre-ville historique de Graz, le Kai 36 est élégamment décoré de tableaux contemporains.
Une sympathique, jeune et dynamique équipe nous a accueilli.
Chambre impeccable, piscine et vue sur les toits de Graz.
negative_comment: Rien.

title: Excellente découverte
positive_comment: Tout. De l’accueil charmant et compétent, en passant par la deco, la chambre très spacieuse et moderne au petit déjeuner. Emplacement idéal et équipé parfaite. Un grand BRAVO ET MERCI
negative_comment: Un petit café et des Kleenex en chambre

title: Idéal pour faire la crêpe au bord de la piscine

- piscine et extérieur très agréable 
- staff super sympa 
- chambre spacieuse 
- hôtel joliment décoré
negative_comment: - plus de rangements pour les affaires dans les chambres serait un plus

title: un moment de détente
positive_comment:
un accueil formidable avec un paquet de gamines aux sourires et a l amabilité plus que californiens.
un vrai bonheur 
une exception dans un pays très sérieux 
proximité immédiate du train a crémaillère menant au château ou se trouve l'opéra local

title: Une expérience magnifique dans un cadre surprenant et beau
positive_comment: Tout. Le service exceptionnel par tous les membres du personnel, l’originalité de l’hôtel transformé en galerie d’art par son propriétaire, la localisation idéale d’accès en voiture et proche du centre ville
negative_comment: Rien

positive_comment:
Le design l’esprit et l’emplacement 
L’amabilité 
Bref séjour idyllique

title: Cool hotel, well situated with wonderful facilities.
positive_comment: The room was exceptional, large wth an amazing shower and botanical products to use. The original art is a nice touch. The property is well situated and right next to the funicular that will take you up to Schlossberg fortress. I didn't get to use the pool as the weather was still mild. I'll definitely stay here again.
Per noi motociclisti è eccezionale. Parcheggio sotto albergo. Buona colazione
Ottimo rapporto qualità prezzo. Colazione buona. Posizione comoda sull’autostrada. Staff delle pulizie cordiale e disponibile. Parcheggio comodo.
Il mio è stato un pernottamento di passaggio. L'albergo è vicino l'autostrada, economico e accogliente
Parcheggio interno anche per moto anche se scoperto Fermata bus di fronte per andare in centro Bus ogni 20 minuti

title: Comodo per Graz.

title: Decisamente positivo e albergo tranquillo.
positive_comment: Ottima colazione e assistenza del personale al momento di bisogno (per esempio il collegamento wifi che in un primo momento non andava ma che poi è stato prontamente rispristinato da un operatore)

positive_comment: La possibilité de manger le soir, la simplicité des démarches
Buona posizione venendo in macchina. Una ventina in macchina dal centro e ci sono anche degli autobus. Colazione discreta e personale simpatico. Nessun problema con il parcheggio.
negative_comment: Di notte fa parecchio caldo ma un silenzioso ventilatore ha aiutato molto.

positive_comment: Totaly worth the money.. its really calm and chill place..ill be back when visiting Graz

title: A perfect choice for a one-night stopover during a journey.

title: Beautiful hotel, would definitely go back
positive_comment: Beautiful hotel, loved all the art and the room was really comfortable, great shower, slept well 🙂

title: Cosy modern, efficient and friendly hotel
positive_comment:
Very modern friendly and efficient 
Management and young staff were exceptionally efficient and friendly.
Loved the cafe, à la carte breakfast and opportunity to mix with locals.
negative_comment: Modernity, in some instances, was prioritised over practicality.”

title: Absolutely great stay!
positive_comment: We absolutely loved our stay here! We travelled with our dog and the hotel was super accomodating with everything. The room was spacious and the bed was amazing. The breakfast was an added bonus, lovely dishes and we both enjoyed it so much. The terrace on the roof was our favorite spot: with an elderflower soda we sat up here and watched the sunset. Absolutely would stay here again when we come back. Location wise it is right around the corner of the entrance to the Schlossberg, where you can take the elevator (small charge) or stairs up for lovely city views.

title: Fab location, top design and good value but above all, a great team. Thank you Kai 36!
positive_comment: Our stay in beautiful Graz was a joy and much of that was down to this beautiful and quirky boutique hotel and very buzzy cafe, which is run by a young, capable and charming crew. All is calm, nothing is too much trouble, everything is followed-up. The thought that went into the design is impressive, the art eclectic and the whole concept simply works really well. It's in a great location. Sadly our visit was too early for the pool but we did enjoy the sauna (which is actually in the next door hotel) The cafe has very good, modern breakfasts and smaller plates as well as great coffee and drinks.
negative_comment: Having to leave!

title: Would hightly recommend
positive_comment:
Stuff was great - location was great! 
Rooms felt very greatly thought out.
negative_comment: It was already getting a little warm - ac was not working

title: Excellent hotel & café tgat deserves its high rating.
positive_comment:
Very original concept, beautiful room, very large, lots of modern art throughout the property including in the rooms.
The staff is exceptional & the location couldn’t be better.very good a la carte breakfast in its café frequented also by locals.
negative_comment: No safe or minibar in rooms, no mirror above bathroom sinks to do make up, or shaving!

title: Beautiful Hotel design and rooms, excellent location, lovely lounge cafe.
positive_comment:
Breakfast was delicious and the cafe staff were prompt and friendly.
The rooms are beautiful and cosy, the upper terraces have spectacular views over the city.
negative_comment:
One morning  we were only allowed to sit at the bar counter for breakfast which was 
a little uncomfortable but the coffee and food offerings were delicious.

title: Wonderful boutique hotel/modern art gallery in the heart of Graz
positive_comment: We had an absolutely wonderful stay at Kai 36. The hotel is beautiful, feels like a boutique art gallery, the modern art in amazing contrast to the historical feel of the building and the area. The location is ideal. Our room was spacious, well designed, and comfortable. The complimentary cosmetics and teas feel luxurious. It is also nice to have a good cafe/bistro in the house. But best of all was the staff - everyone was very professional, nice and helpful. We really felt welcome and taken care of.
negative_comment: The parking fee (26 euros per night) feels a bit too high. But the hotel let us park the car in the garage as long as we wished on the day of departure, which was very generous.

title: Great hotel , perfect location
positive_comment: One of the best and cosiest hotels I ever stayed at

title: A stunningly luxurious winter retreat in Salzburg
positive_comment:
This was an incredible stay in a memorable and luxurious hotel. The staff, from the receptionist to the bar staff, restaurant servers and the chefs, were amazing; they were friendly, attentive and really knowledgeable about their work. Staying in a Superior Castle Room provided a refined and classic environment that felt very relaxing.

The Glass Garden restaurant was a particular highlight. The central glass sculpture by Dale Chihuly creates a beautiful atmosphere and the dining experience was incredible. It was certainly one of the most memorable meals we have ever had with course after course of exquisite tastes. Breakfast was also delightful, with staff who really added to our experience. The hilltop location gave us amazing views and the walk down into the streets was charming in the January snow. The spa was another highlight, and we thoroughly enjoyed the saunas and fitness room during our winter visit.

They’re very helpful and very welcoming.
The room’s space is excellent. 
They have bidet in the bathroom.

negative_comment: Beim Frühstück kein Life Cooking mehr (Pancakes, Waffeln...) Beim Abendessen wird nur mehr die Hauptspeise serviert. Das ist für mich nicht 5-Sterne.

title: Idealer Ort zur Entschleunigung
positive_comment:
Wir haben heuer das Reiters Supreme zum 2. Mal besucht, und schätzen es als Oase der Ruhe und Entspannung.
Hervorzuheben sind die weitläufige und sehr saubere Thermenlandschaft, aber vor allem die hervorragende Küche, welche stets mit neuen Themenabenden zu begeistern weiß. Wir kommen sicher wieder.

title: Wohlfühl Oase, wenn man Auszeit braucht oder nach der Messe wieder Kraft schöpfen möchte bzw sich regenerieren möchte
positive_comment: Fantastisches Ambiente, unfassbar gutes Essen und sehr ambitioniertes und motiviertes Personal

title: Ein in jeder Hinsicht genussvoller Aufenthalt in einem außergewöhnlichen Haus
positive_comment: Sehr schönes Hotel, wunderbare Lage, außerordentlich freundliches Personal! Genügend Licht im Badezimmer!
negative_comment: Es gab nichts, was besser hätte sein können.

title: Una noche en Thôrl
positive_comment:
Personal muy amable  y atento. Nos acompañaron dos veces para que viéramos la habitación,cuando llegamos aún no la tenían preparada. La habitacion muy completa y las vistas a la montaña de los Alpes espectaculares. 
Desayuno muy bien  y bastante completo.

title: An excellent location and comfortable room room provided all we needed.
positive_comment: Host was excellent; friendly, welcoming and professional. Our stay was perfect. Good buffet breakfast that was replenished as needed.
negative_comment: Wifi network was hidden, the password long and tricky to enter, and the speed is slow. We had mobile data so this is a minor issue, but fast easy wifi would be a welcome improvement.

positive_comment: very warm in the room, basic breakfast of good quality, everything in good time
negative_comment: Coffee and tea making facilities are listed in the room, in fact there is none, they lent it to me after an emergency, it should not be stated what is not available

title: A relaxing and luxurious stay.
positive_comment: The hotel was one of the nicest I have stayed at, featuring beautiful rooms, comfortable beds, an amazing location, terrific food, and warm and caring staff. We particularly enjoyed our time in the pool, walking through the park near the hotel to the elevator which takes you down to the old town, and relaxing in our rooms.

title: Second time there. definitely go back  Highly recommend  Food excellent
positive_comment: Staff super friendly. They go out of their way to be helpful
negative_comment: Nothing

positive_comment: Great restaurant, nice view over the city, great hospitality.

title: Fabulous place to stay - don’t hesitate to book !
positive_comment: It was a unique place to stay and the bathroom was amazing !

title: Absolutely fantastic stay
positive_comment:
Impeccable staff
Amazing location 
Wonderful welcome

title: Luv it.
positive_comment: Hospitality industry offering its services at best in all areas. A joy to stay and relax at the facilities.
negative_comment: Location on the hill still not well known among locals

title: Unbelievable place to see Salzburg from, staying in a castle looking over the city amazing, team at HSM fantastic
positive_comment: It’s amazing location facilities friendly and very hospitable team, the pool was spectacular, views from restaurants stunning
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Highly recommended
positive_comment: Great room in a great hotel and excellent breakfast
Big spacious room, very comfortable. In fact there are two rooms, second one has a sofa and access to balcony.
negative_comment: Not a huge deal but the lamp next to sofa didn't work.

title: Mountain chalet with good environment
positive_comment: For low season there is a good chance to get good price.  Rooms are big and is well located to go see the lakes around (by car)
negative_comment: N/a

positive_comment: Sehr geräumiges Zimmer, direkt an der Almstraße (ruhig in der Nacht), sehr freundliche und zuvorkommende Empfangsmitarbeiterin

Mycket stort och fint rum. Med stor terrass. 
Perfekt läge i byn vid starten av mautstrasse.
Bra frukost. Fick äggröra efter beställning som smakade utmärkt.
negative_comment:
Kaffet var förfärligt.
Middag på restaurangen rekommenderas ej. Beställde grillade grönsaker, fick kokta frysta grönsaker.

title: Preis-Leistung ist Tip-Top.
positive_comment: Für die Auffahrt zur Tauplitz liegt das Hotel praktischen an der Pole-Position. Das Zimmer sehr geräumig und sauber und das Personal super lieb. Wir mussten um 6 Uhr früh los und sie haben uns Lunch-Pakete mitgegeben und noch Kaffee und Tee gemacht.

title: Great Hotel
positive_comment: The location of the hotel is very convenient, as it is situated right in front of the bus stop for the resort. The rooms are quite spacious and were perfect for our family of four. While the breakfast was mostly cold, they did offer eggs—fried one day and scrambled the next. We also had dinner at the hotel restaurant, which was a good experience.
negative_comment: There isn’t much to do in the immediate vicinity of the hotel, though you can walk to the downtown area in about 15 minutes. Additionally—though this is not the hotel’s fault—the first bus to the resort doesn't leave until 9:00 AM, which is the same time the resort opens. Lastly, we found the beds to be a bit hard.

title: 5***** supreme spa hotel
positive_comment: Spa area, location, top service, supreme breakfast, adults only. Especially the bistro is top. Thanks to Lenka because of her professional service & friendliness.

title: Superb. I’ll be back
positive_comment: It was exceptional. The facilities are as good as I’ve seen anywhere
negative_comment: Nothing. It really was excellent

positive_comment:
Great property. Perfect location with gorgeous views. Room was a little bit outdated. Great variety of activities offered (yoga etc.) Staff war very friendly and attentive. Breakfast was great with lots of variety. 5 course dinner was good but expected a little bit more. 

It was the perfect place to relax and unwind. The wellness area (saunas, pools) was very clean and offered plenty of opportunities to relax.

title: Excellent
positive_comment:
The hotel is beautifully located, away from the roads. Comfortable large room equipped with everything you need. We did not have a coffee machine and kettle in our room. We asked for it at reception desk and it was brought to us in 5 minutes. Lovely balcony with a marvellous view of the Burgenland hills and fields.
Breakfast and lunch exceeded all expectations! Huge selection of the best quality and natural products. Special thanks to the chefs! Excellent service. The dinners were absolutely delicious! The waiters are very attentive, served quickly and politely. Excellent huge territory with a variety of pools. All new, renovated. A lot of beds for rest. Excellent saunas with access to the pool area and sunbeds for outdoor relaxation.
We liked everything! We will definitely go back there again. We would highly recommend this hotel!
negative_comment: The only thing that wasn't quite comfortable was the pillows. They were too soft. Even though there are 3 pillows for each person, we had to ask for 2 more pillows.

title: Supreme
positive_comment: Man kommt an und fühlt sich wohl. Unglaublich freundliches Personal, Top-Zimmer, hervorragendes, überaus reichliches Buffet und eine tolle Wellness-Landschaft.

title: Sehr entspannter Aufenthalt.
positive_comment: Ausgezeichnetes Essen. Sehr freundliches Personal. Schöne Lage der Anlage.
negative_comment: Der Lobby-Bereich ist mittlerweile etwas in die Jahre gekommen.

title: Ein perfekter Aufenthalt
positive_comment: Exzellente Küche  und ein außerordentlich nettes Personal. Der Pianist Julius war der Highlight des Abends. Die  Kellner Peter und  Abel waren sehr zuvorkommend. Das gesamte Team war absolut perfekt.
Sehr nette und hilfsbereite Bewirtung! Gute Abstellmöglichkeiten für Auto und Fahrrad. Sehr gutes Speisenangebot im Restaurant und sehr gutes Frühstück.

title: Great stay at the Goldener Hirsch
positive_comment: Excellent location, good air con, very comfortable room and bed, lovely engaging staff, quaint building, never waited for a lift, excellent facilities they thought of everything.
negative_comment:
Food was tasty but sparse and my breakfast (eggs Benedict) was cold both days. 
Pillows were very soft but that's probably subjective to each individual.

title: perfect apart from the breakfast
positive_comment: room was great location perfect Breakfast,confusing system  and average food well overpriced too
negative_comment: Breakfast

positive_comment: Central position. Very helpful staff, very clean luxurious hotel
negative_comment: Nothing

positive_comment: This is a very friendly hotel in a great location.

title: Superb hotel in a fantastic location with great staff.
positive_comment: New and really tastefully decorated… great restaurant and bar and wonderfully attentive staff. Location is superb right in the centre of Salzburg.
negative_comment:
There is no gym - I asked but was told that when the building was put up in the 14th century gyms weren’t that popular. Fair point I suppose. 
Parking is close to the property … a five minute walk. If it’s raining not great. We parked the car and forgot about it for two days and wheeled our bags over to the hotel easily.

title: Delightful ambience and superbly decorated. Pleasure to stay at and ideally situated in old town
positive_comment: Superbly appointed rooms with beautiful traditional furnishings. Extremely comfortable. Staff and service extremely helpful. Delightful ambience.

title: Excellent Stay in Salzburg.
positive_comment: Centrally located hotel.  We had a lovely stay.  Friendly, helpful and professional staff.   We were three adults that shared a Junior Suite, there was plenty of room for three of us.  Great bedroom facilities including a proper coffee maker.  Excellent breakfast every day and we ate dinner in the restaurant one evening which was delicisious.

title: Great location and modern facilities with a luxury vibe
positive_comment: Doesn’t look like much from the outside, but inside it’s luxurious and we got a free upgrade

title: Special
positive_comment:
Hotel location superb
Staff really friendly 
Highly recommended
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Amazing exceeded all expectations
positive_comment:
The location, staff, welcoming, breakfast, cleanliness I could not praise the hotel any higher, our stay was amazing, highly recommend and will certainly recommend to my friends as the best place to stay in Salzburg
Thank you

title: Altogether aweseme. Would definitelly recommend.
positive_comment: We liked everything, staff, apples, breakfasts, views, area around it .... etc. Little, cosy city.
negative_comment: We did not like the non-heated water in the pool, non-functional (or broken) fitness equipment, non-working (broken) sauna in the pool section. Room was cold when we came in. Should be heated. Everything else was super.

title: One of my Personal favourites.!!
positive_comment: 2nd stay in 1 week, I really rate this hotel... I like everything about it.. 👍
negative_comment: Again, the only thing I did not like is that I left far too soon.

positive_comment: Pool with sauna, nice clean room, big bed, we asked for kettle and got it for free. Nice view from window. Good breakfast. Free bed towels and bathrobes.
negative_comment:
Pool water could be 1 or 2 digrees warmer (it was around 28/29°C.
Fridge in the room would be perfect.

title: Spiridom.. To me: Great Price to Value Ratio, Love it..!!
positive_comment: I liked the help I received when it wasn't possible for me to arrive by the stated check in time. I liked my room and ensuite. I liked the great view at breakfast. I stay whenever I'm passing. I haven't even mentioned the pool, spa room, steam room, I really like them. What's not to like at Hotel Spiridom, it's reasonably priced with great amenities in a very beautiful area.
negative_comment: I didn't like... that I couldn't stay longer.

positive_comment: If you want a place to relax, go to the surrounding nature and also enjoy wellness, you will like this place. The room was clean and comfy. The SPA area is nice - three saunas and a colder pool for swimming and cooling down and nice resting area.

The whole hotel was just beautiful, the staff very helpful and accommodating. Breakfast was a wonderful selection of food and it all tasted delicious. The spa facilities were clean and well serviced. It was one of the best stays my fiancee and I have had ever. Thank you.
negative_comment: That we had to leave

positive_comment: Friendly staff, well equipped room, very central location, great food - breakfast and dinner and the staff in the restaurant was really nice although I was travelling as single woman, nice Spa with Pool, Sauna and infra-red
negative_comment: The bathroom was very moldy, some lightning did not work, room did not have a nice view - parking, and the fitness is very small and not well equipped.

positive_comment:
The staff were friendly and helpful. The location was perfect for enjoying a relaxing time in Admont and to easily explore near by as well. The room was equipped with everything you would need and very comfortable. The mountain view was beautiful and lovely to enjoy. 
The breakfast was impressive and they accommodated gluten free diet due to allergies. 
Would recommend to stay and would consider to stay again!
negative_comment:
Everything was lovely but a couple things I would note would be: 
The patio room door was broken when we checked in, however, the staff was very helpful and timely with correcting the issue and providing us a new room. 
The spa are is a lot smaller than expected but still nice and enjoyable. 
Also unfortunate that for the price that parking and breakfast at least is not included but again still a lovely stay and would recommend!

positive_comment:
Everything was great!
Thank you so much for the lovely stay

title: Fab hotel for short stay.
positive_comment: Fab hotel for short stay, great setting surrounded by mountains, near monestary, beautifully set up and equipped inside. every room has a balcony. Comfortable beds, no noise from other rooms or corridor. May stay longer next time.
negative_comment: nothing.

title: Wunderbarer Kurzurlaub mit Wandern und Entspannung
positive_comment: Tolle Lage, sehr gutes Essen, sehr freundliches Personal, sehr schöner kleiner Wellnessbereich mit Schwimmmöglichkeit im Altausseer See
negative_comment: Am Fußboden im Zimmer und an wenigen Stellen im Haus merkt man, dass der Zahn der Zeit nagt

title: Ich kann das Haus weiterempfehlen, jedoch  Preisleistung für Zimmer mit Frühstück passt nicht.

title: Skvělé
positive_comment: Vše bylo perfektní, od velmi milé blondýnky v recepci při příjezdu až po posezení v baru. Wellness je špička! Náš pokoj byl vkusný a vždy dokonale čistý. Snídaně - vše čerstvé a v nejvyšší kvalitě. Ideální je koncept oddělení "dětského hotelu" od samostatného adults only hotelu. Areál je veliký a všude lze najít něco zajímavého - romantická zákoutí, sportoviště, zvířata.
